schinese.CREDITS_WE_THANK_OUR_FAMILIES_AND_LOVE: 感谢我们的家人和挚爱，在过去三年中给予我们无与伦比的支持和理解。
schinese.CREDITS_YETI_ARE_TRADEMARKS_OF_KRYPTEK: Yeti 是 Kryptek Outdoor Group, LLC 的商标。迷彩图案
schinese.CREDITS_YOU_GAVE_US_THE_STRENGTH_TO_RE: 是你们给了我们力量，让我们走得更远。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_BREAKING_RULES: "人们记住你，是因为你打破的规则，而不是你遵守的。" - 道格拉斯·麦克阿瑟将军
schinese.DEADQUOTE_DOING_EVIL_FOR_GOOD: "战争永远是以恶行求善果。" - 巴兹尔·H·利德尔-哈特爵士
schinese.DEADQUOTE_DO_NOTHING: "邪恶得逞的唯一条件，就是好人袖手旁观。" - 埃德蒙·伯克
schinese.DEADQUOTE_ENTRUST_FREEDOM: "历史不会长久地将自由托付给懦弱之人。" - 德怀特·D·艾森豪威尔
schinese.DEADQUOTE_GOD_TAKES_SIDES: "上帝站在炮火更猛的那一边。" - 拿破仑·波拿巴
schinese.DEADQUOTE_GOING_TOO_FAR: "只有敢于走得太远的人，才有可能知道自己能走多远。" - T.S.艾略特
schinese.DEADQUOTE_HONOR_THE_DEAD: "尊重逝者，为生者拼死而战。" - 匿名
schinese.DEADQUOTE_JUGGERNAUT_CORNERED: 别被重装兵逼到墙角。保持距离。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_JUGGERNAUT_EXPLOSIVES: 爆炸物对重装兵非常有效。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_JUGGERNAUT_FLASHBANGS: 使用 ^3[{+smoke}]^7 闪光弹减缓重装兵的速度。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_JUGGERNAUT_HEADSHOTS: 面对重装兵时尽量瞄准头部。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_MEDAL_OR_BODYBAG: "我们保证给你一枚勋章，一个装尸袋，或者两样都给。" - 三角洲部队
schinese.DEADQUOTE_NOT_FIT_TO_LIVE: "一个不愿为某事而死的人，不配活着。" - 马丁·路德·金
schinese.DEADQUOTE_NOT_TAKEN_LIGHTLY: "夺取他人生命是重大之举，不可轻率而为。" - 蒂姆·柯林斯中校
schinese.DEADQUOTE_PREVENT_AND_PREPARE: "人无法同时阻止战争又准备战争。" - 阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦
schinese.DEADQUOTE_RIOTSHIELD_DONT_CHARGE: 保持距离！冲向持防暴盾的敌人是自寻死路。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_RIOTSHIELD_OUT_FLANK: 防暴盾只能防正面！绕到侧面，他们跟普通敌人没两样。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_RIOTSHIELD_USE_EXPLOSIVE: 试试用手雷、RPG和榴弹发射器对付持防暴盾的敌人。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_ROUGH_MEN_READY: "我们能安睡在床，是因为粗犷的汉子在黑夜中时刻准备着，将暴力施与那些可能伤害我们的人。" - 乔治·奥威尔
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_BEAT_BEST_TIME: 试着打破自己的最佳时间。 尝试不同的策略和路线。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_BLED_OUT: 队友失血过多阵亡了。团队协作，有人倒下时互相救援。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_CLAYMORE_ENEMIES_SHOOT: 敌人会射击暴露的阔剑地雷。把地雷藏在掩体后面。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_CLAYMORE_POINT_ENEMY: 布置阔剑地雷时，让红色光束朝向敌人出现的方向。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_CRAWL_TO_TEAMMATE: 如果被击倒，尽量爬向你的队友。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_FIND_FRIEND_COOP: 没人能孤军奋战！ 在分屏或双人在线模式下与朋友一起玩。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_FRIENDLY_FIRE_HINT: 你会伤到队友！避免友军误伤。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_FRIENDLY_FIRE_KILL: 因友军误伤导致任务失败。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_ICON_OBJ: 白色光点标记了你的目标位置。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_ICON_OBJ_OFFSCREEN: 当目标不在视野内时，图标会发生变化。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_ICON_PARTNER: 通过名字找到你的队友。如果他们不在屏幕上，绿色箭头会指向他们的方向。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_LEFT_PLAY_AREA: 坚守阵地！ 你已放弃任务。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_RED_FIND_COVER: 屏幕变红时，赶紧找掩体。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_RUN_OVER_BY_VEHICLE: 你被碾过了。注意敌方移动车辆。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SEARCH_FOR_WEAPONS: 留意能帮上忙的特殊武器。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_STAR_RANKINGS: 困难难度通关行动获得2星。老兵难度获得3星。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_STAY_NEAR_TEAMMATE: 靠近你的队友，协同作战。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_STEALTH_LOOK_FOR_ENEMIES: 开枪前先观察靠近或正对你的敌人。快速消灭整组敌人以免暴露。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_STEALTH_STAY_LOW: 保持低姿态。站立或冲刺时更容易被看见和听见。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_STEALTH_USE_SILENCERS: 使用消音器。手雷和无消音武器会引来大量注意。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_AMMO_REFILL: "弹药补给"可填满所有携带武器的子弹。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_ARMORY_UNLOCK: 随着等级提升，查看军械库中的新解锁。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_ARMOR_RESTOCK: 护甲提供伤害防护。在装备军械库中可以补满。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_ATTACHMENT: 你的武器可能有可用配件，在武器军械库中购买升级。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_BUY_NEW_WEAPON: 补充弹药时，考虑买把新武器，它会自带满弹匣。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_CHALLENGE_REWARD: 在同一波中多次完成迷你挑战可获得更高奖励。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_FRIENDLY_RIOTSHIEL: 友方防暴盾兵在战斗中丢弃盾牌时，你也能获益。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_KILL_CHEMICAL_ENEM: 趁化学毒气敌人靠近其他敌人时将其击杀，效果最佳。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_LAST_STAND: 自我复活让你能通过击杀敌人来起身。可在装备军械库补充。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_RIOT_SHIELD_DAMAGE: 防暴盾在承受足够伤害后会破碎，但仍能提供一定防护。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_SENTRY_UNATTENDED: 如果放任自动炮台无人看管，敌人更可能去攻击它们。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_STAR_RANKINGS: 存活到第5波获1星，第10波获2星，第20波获3星。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_SURVIVAL_WAVE_BONUS: 爆头、精度、承受伤害和时间都会影响你的波次奖励。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_TEXT_COLOR_DIFFICULTY: 选择任务时，红色文字表示难度高于绿色文字。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_THROW_FLASHBANG: 按下 ^3[{+smoke}]^7 投掷闪光弹，眩晕敌人。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_TOGGLE_TIMER: 按下^3 [{+actionslot 1}] ^7切换计时器和任务数据。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_TOGGLE_WEAP_ALT_MODE: 按下^3 [{+actionslot 3}] ^7使用榴弹发射器和下挂式霰弹枪。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_TRY_NEW_DIFFICULTY: 如果特别行动太难或太简单，试试其他难度。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_SO_TURRET_PLACEMENT: 保护好你的哨戒炮台！把它们放在掩体中不易被侧袭的位置。
schinese.DEADQUOTE_THE_END_OF_WAR: "只有逝者见过战争的终结。" - 柏拉图
schinese.DEADQUOTE_THE_WILL_TO_WIN: "在缺乏必胜意志的情况下参战是致命的。" - 道格拉斯·麦克阿瑟将军
schinese.DEADQUOTE_UNDERSTANDING_WAR: "理解战争的起点，是理解人性。" - S.L.A.马歇尔
schinese.DEADQUOTE_WAR_IS_DESTRUCTION: "战争是毁灭的科学。" - 约翰·S·C·阿博特
schinese.DEADQUOTE_WAR_IS_FEAR: "战争是披着勇气外衣的恐惧。" - 威廉·C·威斯特摩兰将军
schinese.DEADQUOTE_WAR_IS_TERRIBLE: "幸好战争如此残酷，否则我们可能会对它太过喜爱。" - 罗伯特·E·李将军
schinese.DEADQUOTE_WORLD_WAR_IV: "我不知道第三次世界大战会用什么武器打，但第四次世界大战一定是用棍棒和石头。" - 阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦
schinese.DETROIT_DOCTOR_DEAD: 皮埃尔·丹诺瓦博士已被击杀。
schinese.DF_BAGHDAD_DEADQUOTE_ABANDONED_TEAM: 你抛弃了队友。团结一致。
schinese.DF_BAGHDAD_GRAB_A_STINGER_TO_TAKE: 拿取毒刺导弹摧毁敌方装甲。
schinese.DF_BAGHDAD_GRAPPLE_ESCAPE: 按下 ^3 [{+smoke}] 发射钩爪脱身！
schinese.DF_BAGHDAD_USE_STINGER: 按住 ^3[{+activate}]^7 捡起毒刺导弹
schinese.DF_BAGHDAD_WARBIRD_STRAFE: 按下 [{+actionslot 1}] 呼叫猛禽扫射
schinese.DF_BAGHDAD_WARN_LEAVEMISSION: 警告！正在离开任务区域
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG1: 轻型外骨骼移动速度最快，拥有全部喷射能力，但承受伤害能力最低。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG10: 护甲属性升级可提高承受敌方伤害的能力。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG11: 当心跟随敌方无人机操控员的追踪无人机，它们会追踪并爆炸！
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG2: 重型外骨骼移动速度最慢，只能喷射跳跃，但造成和承受的伤害都最高。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG3: 专家型配备光学迷彩，血量和移动速度中等。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG4: 每个兵种都配有内置连杀奖励，随时间自动充能。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG5: 参与目标行动可获得支援空投的点数。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG6: 每次获得支援空投，你的团队都会额外获得一个升级点数。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG7: 通过击杀敌人和参与目标行动来填充支援空投条。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG8: "全武器解锁"技能可让所有兵种使用所有武器类型。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWCOOP_MSG9: 武器熟练度属性升级每提升一级，可增加所有武器的伤害。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG1: 你必须穿上^3外骨骼装甲^7才能使用^3外骨骼升级柜^7。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG10: ^3EMZ^7如果击中你，或者你试图喷射躲开它们，会禁用你的^3外骨骼装甲^7。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG12: ^3爆炸者^7死亡时会伤害周围的僵尸。如果让它们蓄力完成，爆炸也会伤到你。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG13: ^3净化区域^7可以同时治疗多名玩家，还能杀死范围内的所有敌人。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG14: 快速治疗你的队友！处于^3最后挣扎^7的玩家会随时间缓慢失去外骨骼升级，直到被救起。^3流血倒下^7会失去所有外骨骼升级，需要一套新外骨骼。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG15: ^3信用点分配器^7经常故障。可以用它赚点零钱。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG16: ^3流血倒下^7后复活时，及时赶回死亡地点可以捡回掉落的武器。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG17: ^3阿特拉斯^7的^3补给箱^7会随机出现。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG18: ^3垃圾滑道^7提供了一种快速但气味难闻的移动方式。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG19: ^3安保系统^7会短时间内激活所有^3陷阱^7。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG2: 每个^3外骨骼升级柜^7都有自己的^3电站^7。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG20: ^3陷阱^7是消灭大群敌人的利器，但在附近要小心。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG21: ^3电力过载^7会冲击电网，使所有^33D打印机^7在短时间内激活。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG22: 激活^3光学迷彩^7会让敌人短时间内无视你。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG23: "汉堡镇的肉饼绝不用微波炉加热！我们只用最上等的平底锅，来制作放入顾客口中的美味肉饼！" - 汉堡镇员工手册
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG24: 汉堡镇连锁店的创始人诺伯特·T·斯帕克福德三世，在创业前曾是一名成功的宇航员。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG25: 据报，本地Hoard More超市的经理哈里·鲍尔斯坦，曾被宠物鳄鱼咬掉手臂。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG26: 事实："汉堡镇男孩小巴比"是所有汉堡镇汽车穿梭餐厅的电子动画吉祥物。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG27: 如果你抛弃^3幸存者^7，他们就不会前往撤离点。所以……别那么做。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG28: 当^3幸存者^7被红色轮廓标记时，他即将惨死。救他！
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG29: ^3幸存者^7在救援过程中可以自卫——但他们仍然需要你的帮助才能活命！
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG3: 每把武器可在^3武器升级站^7升级20次。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG30: 付出关心就有回报！成功护送^3幸存者^7到达撤离点，玩家将在回合结束时获得免费武器升级。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG31: 未能救出^3幸存者^7将禁用所有^3终端^7，并切断激活中的^3发电机^7的电源。别紧张！
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG32: 找到^3幸存者^7后，你有时间限制……必须在僵尸之前赶到他身边。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG33: 当^3阿特拉斯^7撤离该镇时，他们在关键位置留下了几个非常规的^3陷阱^7。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG34: 在全镇寻找^3陷阱^7。每个都有独特的反僵尸杀戮方式。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG35: ^3陷阱^7可以让你喘口气……但有些会伤害你和你的团队！谨慎使用！
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG36: 如果听到^3毒气区域^7的警报，立即离开，否则有感染风险。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG37: 在^3毒气区域^7停留越久，用于净化自己的时间就越少。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG38: 如果你在门口看到毒气，该区域很可能是^3毒气区域^7。小心前进！
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG39: ^3尖刺者^7是受伤害时会向四周喷射弹片的僵尸。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG4: ^3外骨骼震击^7可在空中使用，击杀或眩晕地面上的敌人。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG40: ^3酸液怪^7在追击时会在地上留下一滩滩酸液。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG41: ^3肉袋^7身穿战术护甲，对躯干和头部射击有抗性。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG42: ^3歌利亚^7是穿着强大AST机甲的感染人类士兵。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG43: ^3歌利亚^7装备有肩载自动防空火箭炮。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG44: ^3歌利亚^7手持防暴盾，可阻挡正面大部分伤害。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG45: ^3"磁控管" Q7微波武器^7可在大范围内炙烤目标并使其减速。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG46: 可以使用^3"磁控管" Q7微波武器^7减缓大群僵尸的速度，让队友更容易消灭它们。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG47: ^33D打印机^7每次激活时随机生成一把新武器。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG48: 使用^3手雷回收机^7换取额外的^3信用点^7。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG49: ^3货舱^7里有一个绰号^3"小嘴"^7的回收无人机。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG5: ^3外骨骼士兵^7减少腰射散布，允许奔跑滑铲时开火，加快换枪速度。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG50: 飞船配备了4个^3船员传送器^7用于快速移动。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG51: ^3哨兵^7的研究确认奥兹是所有感染的源头。他们说得对吗？
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG52: 莉莉丝为奥兹的逝去而哀悼。她的朋友还有可能活着吗？
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG53: 德克尔不喜欢思考。他喜欢开枪。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG54: 卡恩一直希望有一天能扬帆远航——但绝不是以这种方式。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG55: 伦诺克斯赌莉莉丝、德克尔和卡恩能帮他完成任务——如果他们没先杀了他的话。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG56: 如果房间被污染，^3净化区域^7会被禁用。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG57: 如果看到无人机正在远离你，把它打下来！
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG58: ^3传送手雷^7可以进行传送击杀。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG59: ^3LZ-52 Limbo^7最适合清理密集的敌人集群。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG6: 单人游戏时，^3外骨骼医护兵^7给你一次免费自我复活。只能有限次数地重新购买。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG60: ^3斥力器^7可用于击退附近的敌人。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG61: ^3爆炸触感^7接触即杀敌人。冲锋！
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG62: ^3火力全开^7使所有弹药自由恢复。死死扣住扳机！
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG63: ^3阿特拉斯破坏者^7已登上飞船，试图用^3曼提柯尔毒气^7污染它。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG64: ^3阿特拉斯破坏者^7装备了^3光学迷彩^7，对僵尸隐形。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG65: ^3阿特拉斯破坏者^7还是人类。一些对僵尸有效的装备对他们不起作用。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG66: 当回合开始时，飞船过多区域受到污染，就会释放出一台^3歌利亚^7。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG67: ^3哨兵增援^7可以复活玩家并拆除^3曼提柯尔毒气^7炸弹。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG68: ^3外骨骼储备^7增加你的弹药和手雷储备。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG7: 组队时，^3外骨骼医护兵^7可以快速救起队友。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG70: ^3高级斥力炮台^7可减缓、伤害并电磁脉冲僵尸。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG71: 如果及时拆除第一颗炸弹，它会掉落奖励；否则，剩余的^3阿特拉斯破坏者^7会移动到附近区域继续制造混乱。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG77: 驾驶^3歌利亚级装甲^7时不会受到感染。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG78: 据报道，该区域出现了组合了之前所见能力的僵尸。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG8: 如果被^3宿主^7感染，在时间耗尽前使用^3净化区域^7，否则你会变异。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG80: 有人在篡改设施内置的^3紧急传送系统^7。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG81: 奥兹从不是阿特拉斯的清洁工。那只是阿特拉斯植入的记忆。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG82: 莉莉丝曾因入侵公司邮件——包括卡恩的邮件——差点被解雇。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG83: 如果活下来，卡恩计划把阿特拉斯告到倾家荡产。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG84: 德克尔在药物测试中作弊，才当上了阿特拉斯的保安。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG85: 在DNA炸弹夺走奥兹之前，伦诺克斯曾在哨兵与他共事。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG9: 在^3武器升级站^7升级武器会补满弹药。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG1: 有些连杀奖励可以操控，但会让你在地面上毫无防备。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG10: 防爆服技能可提高你对爆炸的抗性。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG11: 即使把重型盾牌背在背上，它也能挡子弹。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG12: 冷血技能让你对热成像、目标增强器和威胁手雷隐形。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG13: 强硬路线可降低连杀奖励所需分数。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG14: 用眩晕手雷可以暂时瘫痪遥控炮台。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG15: 导弹打击可让你控制从空中发射的导弹。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG16: 使用外骨骼盾牌时蹲下，可以护住脚部获得最大保护。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG17: 默认配置包含高等级解锁的物品，让你预览未来的内容。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG18: 拾荒者技能可让你从倒下的敌人身上补充弹药。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG19: 手枪的战术刀配件可加快近战攻击速度。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG2: 在你的战斗记录中查看所有勋章。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG20: 双持武器火力更猛，但无法使用机械瞄准。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG21: 盲眼技能让你免受空中支援和哨戒炮的威胁。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG22: 上下滚动你的连杀奖励列表，选择立即想要使用的那个。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG23: 快速换弹速度更快，但会丢弃当前弹匣的剩余弹药。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG24: 你可以在空中进行外骨骼闪避。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG25: 你可以在空中向前外骨骼冲刺。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG26: 向下喷射踩踏敌人可以将其击杀。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG27: 外骨骼移动会显示在敌方的小地图上。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG28: 想磨练技巧？试试战斗准备训练。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG3: 子弹打在重型盾牌上可能反弹并造成击杀！
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG4: 编辑你的玩家名片，展示已获得的称号和徽章。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG5: 在比赛总结页面左右翻页查看更详细信息。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG6: 已获得的名片和徽章在进入转生模式后不会重置。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG7: 中途退出游戏会让你失去比赛奖励。
schinese.DIDYOUKNOW_MSG8: 补给箱是轨道空投，随机奖励一个连杀奖励。
schinese.DLC_DLCREMOVED: 一个可下载内容包已被移除，或所有配置文件已登出。
schinese.DLC_DLCREMOVED_SP: 一个战役内容包已被移除。
schinese.DLC_MAPS_DESC_LOCKED: 下载额外的多人游戏地图。
schinese.DLC_NOTEVERYONEHASREQUIREDDLC: 该播放列表需要的一个地图包你已拥有，但你的队伍中其他成员没有。
schinese.DLC_PLAYER_DOESNT_HAVE_MAP_PACK: &&2 已禁用！ &&1 没有该地图包。
schinese.DLC_PLAYLIST_MAPS_NOT_ENABLED: 该播放列表需要的地图包已被禁用。
schinese.DLC_REQUIRED_CONTENT_NOT_FOUND: 所需地图包 &&1 丢失或损坏。
schinese.DLC_SEARCH_IS_DISABLED: 现已为普通播放列表禁用DLC内容搜索。
schinese.DLC_SEARCH_IS_TAKING_TIME: 搜索包含你的DLC的游戏需要一些时间。是否继续？
schinese.EXE_AUTODL_CLIENTDISABLED: 无法下载 &&1，因为客户端已禁用自动下载。 你需要从其他途径获取此文件才能连接到此服务器，或在设置中将自动下载设为"是"。
schinese.EXE_AUTODL_FILENOTONSERVER: 文件 &&1 未在服务器上找到用于自动下载。
schinese.EXE_AUTODL_SERVERDISABLED: 无法下载 &&1，因为服务器已禁用自动下载。 在设置中将自动下载设为"否"，如果你确实有此文件，则可能可以连接。
schinese.EXE_AUTODL_SERVERDISABLED_PURE: 无法下载 &&1，因为服务器已禁用自动下载。 你需要从其他途径获取此文件才能连接到此纯净服务器。
schinese.EXE_BAD_CHALLENGE: 地址没有验证或验证无效。
schinese.EXE_CANTAUTODLGAMEPAK: 无法自动下载游戏IWD文件 &&1。
schinese.EXE_COD_FEATURE_PERM_BAN_PLAYER: 该配置文件 (&&1) 因违反已发布的安全与执行政策而被永久禁止使用此功能。详情请访问 http://support.activision.com/aw。
schinese.EXE_COD_FEATURE_TEMP_BAN_PLAYER: 该配置文件 (&&1) 因违反已发布的安全与执行政策而被暂时禁止使用此功能。详情请访问 http://support.activision.com/aw。
schinese.EXE_COD_LEADERBOARD_WRITE_BAN: 该配置文件 (&&1) 因违反已发布的安全与执行政策而被禁止出现在此排行榜上。详情请访问 http://support.activision.com/aw。
schinese.EXE_COD_MULTIPLAYER: 使命召唤：高级战争 多人游戏
schinese.EXE_COD_ONLINE_PERM_BAN_CONSOLE: 该主机设备因违反已发布的安全与执行政策而被永久禁止在线游玩使命召唤：高级战争。详情请访问 http://support.activision.com/aw。
schinese.EXE_COD_ONLINE_PERM_BAN_PLAYER: 该配置文件 (&&1) 因违反已发布的安全与执行政策而被永久禁止在线游玩使命召唤：高级战争。详情请访问 http://support.activision.com/aw。
schinese.EXE_COD_ONLINE_TEMP_BAN_PLAYER: 该配置文件 (&&1) 因违反已发布的安全与执行政策而被暂时禁止在线游玩使命召唤：高级战争。详情请访问 http://support.activision.com/aw。
schinese.EXE_CONFIGSTRINGMISMATCH: 我们的关卡快速文件与服务器不同！正在终止连接
schinese.EXE_DEMONWARE_DISCONNECT: 使命召唤：高级战争服务当前不可用。请稍后再试。
schinese.EXE_DEMONWARE_MULTIPLE_LOGINS: 因COD账户多次登录，使命召唤：高级战争服务器当前不可用。请重启以重新连接。
schinese.EXE_DEMONWARE_MULTIPLE_LOGINS_GENERIC: 因账户多次登录，使命召唤：高级战争服务器当前不可用。
schinese.EXE_DEMONWARE_PLAYER_BAN: 该配置文件 (&&1) 因违反已发布的安全与执行政策而被永久禁止在线游玩使命召唤：高级战争。详情请访问 http://support.activision.com/aw。
schinese.EXE_DISCONNECTEDFROMOWNLISTENSERVER: 客户端被告知断开与自身监听服务器的连接。
schinese.EXE_DNSFAILURE: DNS解析失败，无法定位Activision服务器。重启之前你将无法进行在线游戏。
schinese.EXE_ERR_ARB_MULTITEX_BAD_MAX: 已找到GL_ARB_multitexture，但不允许多重纹理。
schinese.EXE_ERR_BAD_WINDOWS_VER: 你的Microsoft Windows(TM)版本不支持使命召唤：高级战争。
schinese.EXE_ERR_BANNED_PERM: 你已被永久禁止进入此服务器。
schinese.EXE_ERR_BANNED_TEMP: 你已被暂时禁止进入此服务器。
schinese.EXE_ERR_CORRECT_FOLDER: 请确保从正确的文件夹运行使命召唤：高级战争。
schinese.EXE_ERR_COULDNT_CREATE_WINDOW: 无法创建窗口。这是一个Microsoft Windows(TM)错误。你可能需要重启。
schinese.EXE_ERR_COULDNT_LOAD_OPENGL: 无法加载OpenGL。请确保已从制造商网站安装最新的显卡驱动程序。
schinese.EXE_ERR_COULDNT_REGISTER_WINDOW: 无法注册窗口类。这是一个Microsoft Windows(TM)错误。你可能需要重启。
schinese.EXE_ERR_GAME_FAILED_PURE_CHECK: 游戏代码(&&1)未能通过纯净服务器验证
schinese.EXE_ERR_GET_NEWEST_DRIVERS: 你应该安装最新的显卡驱动程序，务必先卸载旧驱动。如果已装有最新驱动，请彻底卸载后重新安装。这能解决大多数问题。如果游戏仍然无法运行，可能是你的显卡不满足最低要求。请查看readme文件获取更多信息，包括支持的显卡列表。
schinese.EXE_ERR_HIGH_PING_ONLY: 此服务器仅供高延迟玩家使用。
schinese.EXE_ERR_HUNKUSAGE_CANT_WRITE: 无法写入 hunkusage.dat，请检查磁盘空间。
schinese.EXE_ERR_HUNK_ALLOC_FAILED: Hunk数据分配失败，需要 &&1 兆。
schinese.EXE_ERR_INVALID_CD_KEY: 密钥无效。 请在多人游戏选项/输入密钥菜单中输入你的密钥，然后再次尝试连接服务器。
schinese.EXE_ERR_INVALID_DEMO_FILE: 你选择了一个无效的影片或剪辑。
schinese.EXE_ERR_LOW_PING_ONLY: 此服务器仅供低延迟玩家使用。
schinese.EXE_ERR_MULTITEX_BAD_MAX: 已找到OpenGL 1.3多重纹理，但不允许多重纹理。
schinese.EXE_ERR_MULTITEX_INIT_FAIL: 已找到OpenGL 1.3多重纹理，但初始化失败。
schinese.EXE_ERR_NOT_A_DEMO_SERVER: 此服务器不是演示服务器。
schinese.EXE_ERR_NO_LAST_SAVE: 最后一次存档似乎已被删除。请从加载游戏菜单中加载其他存档，或开始新游戏。
schinese.EXE_ERR_ONLINE_DATA: 使命召唤：高级战争服务当前不可用。请稍后再试或访问 http://www.callofduty.com/aw/status 查看更新。 错误代码：&&1
schinese.EXE_ERR_PROCESS_DEMO_FILE_FAILED: 处理此影片或剪辑时发生错误。
schinese.EXE_ERR_QPORT: 无法连接。服务器上存在重复qport。
schinese.EXE_ERR_READING_DEMO: 读取影片或剪辑时发生错误。
schinese.EXE_ERR_SERVER_TIMEOUT: 与主机/服务器失去连接。连接超时。
schinese.EXE_ERR_UNAUTHORIZED_IP: 使命召唤：高级战争服务器已拒绝来自此IP地址的访问。
schinese.EXE_ERR_UNREGISTERED_CONNECTION: 服务器拒绝了我们的连接请求。
schinese.EXE_ERR_VIDEOCARD_MISSING_FEATURE: 你的显卡似乎缺少运行使命召唤：高级战争所需的一项或多项功能。
schinese.EXE_FAILED_ADD_LOBBY: 未能将队伍成员添加到大厅
schinese.EXE_FAVORITEINLIST: 此服务器已是收藏服务器。

schinese.EXE_GETTINGINFOFORSERVERS: 正在获取 &&1/&&2 个服务器的信息 (ESC取消)
schinese.EXE_GETTINGINFOFORSERVERS2: 正在获取 &&1/&&2 个服务器的信息
schinese.EXE_HOST_HANDLE_ERROR: 无法建立到主机的安全连接

schinese.EXE_ONLINE_TEMP_BAN_PLAYER: &&1 已被暂时禁止在使命召唤：高级战争服务器上游玩。详情请访问 http://www.callofduty.com/aw/help。
schinese.EXE_ONLINE_TEMP_BAN_PLAYER_NO_NAME: 你已被暂时禁止在使命召唤：高级战争服务器上游玩。详情请访问 http://www.callofduty.com/aw/help。

schinese.FINALE_SHAFT_BUTTONS_PC_ALT: 按住 ^3[{+attack}]^7 和 ^3[{+ads}]^7 减缓下降

schinese.FUSION_BOOST_SLAM_HINT_PC: 双击 ^3[{+gostand}]^7 然后按 ^3[{+togglecrouch}]^7 喷射震击

schinese.FUSION_PROMPT_DEPLOY_DRONE: 按下 ^3[{+actionslot 1}]^7 部署你的无人机
schinese.FUSION_PROMPT_DEPLOY_DRONE_FAIL: 无法部署 - 需要更多空间
schinese.GAME_CANT_GET_GRENADE_WEAP_MESSAGE: 你必须选中手雷才能拾取不同类型的手雷。
schinese.GAME_CANT_GET_PISTOL_WEAP_MESSAGE: 你必须选中手枪才能拾取不同的手枪。
schinese.GAME_CANT_GET_SMOKER_WEAP_MESSAGE: 你必须选中烟雾弹才能拾取不同类型的烟雾弹。
schinese.GAME_COMPLAINTFILEDAGAINST: 已针对你提交投诉。(&&1 后将被踢出)
schinese.GAME_CROUCH_BLOCKED_WEAPON: 无法在此蹲下使用此武器。
schinese.GAME_CUSTOM_GAMEMODE: 使命召唤：高级战争 自定义游戏模式
schinese.GAME_INACTIVEDROPWARNING: 警告：由于挂机，你即将被踢出。
schinese.GAME_LAST_STAND_GET_BACK_UP: 击杀一个敌人来重新站起来！
schinese.GAME_MAXVOTESCALLED: 你已发起最大次数的投票。
schinese.GAME_MUSTBEALIVECOMMAND: 你必须在存活状态下使用此命令。
schinese.GAME_NOSPECTATORCALLVOTE: 禁止以旁观者身份发起投票。
schinese.GAME_NOSPECTATORVOTE: 禁止以旁观者身份投票。
schinese.GAME_ONLINE_UPDATE_DESCRIPTION: 使命召唤：高级战争 在线更新
schinese.GAME_SAVE_DESCRIPTION: 使命召唤：高级战争 存档
schinese.GAME_SAVE_INSUFFICIENT_FREE_DISK: 可用磁盘空间不足。 请释放游戏驱动器上至少5MB的可用空间。
schinese.GAME_SAVE_UNABLE_TO_ACCESS_DEVICE: 无法访问存档设备。请确保你有有效的用户配置文件(Xbox Live 账户。请使用 Xenon Launcher 中的 "工具")。
schinese.GAME_SAVE_UNABLE_TO_READ_FROM_DEVICE: 无法从存储设备读取。请检查设备是否正确插入。
schinese.GAME_STAND_BLOCKED_WEAPON: 无法在此站立使用此武器。
schinese.GAME_TYPEMAP_NOCHANGE: 投票不会更改游戏类型或地图。
schinese.GAME_USERNOTONSERVER: 用户 &&1 不在服务器上。
schinese.GAME_VOTINGNOTENOUGHPLAYERS: 玩家人数不足以发起投票。
schinese.GRAPPLE_INPUT_WALL_GAMEPAD: 10 下降   ^3[{+gostand}]^7 跳跃   ^3[{+stance}]^7 脱离
schinese.GRAPPLE_INPUT_WALL_PC: ^3[{+back}]^7 下降   ^3[{+gostand}]^7 跳跃   ^3[{+togglecrouch}]^7 脱离
schinese.GREECE_CAMERA_POTENTIAL_TARGET:
Potential target located
Hold ^3[{+attack}]^7 to Scan
schinese.GREECE_DRONE_ALERT_FAIL: The KVA have been alerted to your presence.
schinese.GREECE_DRONE_BURKEKILLED_FAIL: You allowed Gideon to be killed.
schinese.GREECE_DRONE_INVALIDTARGET_FAIL: Shoot only designated targets to avoid alerting the KVA.
schinese.GREECE_DRONE_KILLHADES_FAIL: You killed Hades before getting the necessary intel.
schinese.GREECE_DRONE_NOKILLHADES_FAIL: You took too long to kill Hades.
schinese.GREECE_DRONE_TIMEREXPIRE_FAIL: You must kill all enemies before the mute charge runs out.
schinese.GREECE_FAIL_ENDING_LATE_TRIGGER: 你让车队通过，未能引爆炸药。
schinese.GREECE_FAIL_ENDING_PLACE_EXPLOSIVE: 你必须在时间耗尽前安放炸药。
schinese.GREECE_FAIL_SCRAMBLE_SUPPRESS_SNIPER: 压制狙击手，避免受到重创。
schinese.GREECE_HINT_CAR_ALARM: 触发汽车警报引开守卫
schinese.GREECE_HINT_COURTYARD_OVERWATCH: 消灭监视庭院的2名守卫
schinese.GREECE_HINT_DRONE2_USE: 按下 ^3[{+activate}]^7 控制一架KVA无人机
schinese.GREECE_HINT_DRONE_SHOOT: 按下 ^3[{+breath_sprint}]^7 稳定，按下 ^3[{+attack}]^7 开火
schinese.GREECE_HINT_HADES_ZOOM: 从建筑前方放大观察哈迪斯
schinese.GREECE_HINT_MUTE_BREACH: 按下 ^3[{+activate}]^7 发出静默突破信号
schinese.GREECE_HINT_SCRAMBLE_SUPPRESS: 压制狙击手以便伊洛娜前进
schinese.GREECE_MARKET_TARGETESCAPE3_FAIL: 你必须在KVA被惊动前杀死关键人物。
schinese.HORDE_AERIAL_ASSAULT_DESC: 一架由AI控制的小型空中无人机，配备机载机枪。
schinese.HORDE_ARMORY_CANCEL_REWARD_DESC: 你将获得1个升级点数作为替代。
schinese.HORDE_ARMORY_OFFLINE: ^1系统入侵中 - 军械库离线
schinese.HORDE_ARMORY_REPLACE: 替换当前的发射器武器？
schinese.HORDE_ARMORY_TURRET_DENIED: ^1装备炮台头部时无法使用军械库
schinese.HORDE_ARMORY_WEAPON_RESTRICTION: 武器选择受你的兵种限制。选择"全武器解锁"技能来使用所有武器。
schinese.HORDE_ASM1_DESC: 全自动。持续射击提高精度并降低射速。同级最佳伤害。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_ARMORY_ATTACHMENTS: 购买高级武器配件，如扩容弹匣、激光指示器、枪托等。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_ARMORY_OPTICS: 购买增强型武器瞄具，如红点、ACOG或目标增强器瞄准镜。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_DRONE_CLASS: 配备机枪、火箭弹、光学迷彩和区域治疗的空中突击无人机。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_EXO_ABILITIES: 选择你的外骨骼能力，如光学迷彩、悬浮等。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_EXO_DEMOLITION: 正常移动速度，有限喷射能力，正常护甲。可使用发射器和冲锋枪。兵种连杀奖励：导弹打击。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_EXO_HEAVY: 最慢移动速度，有限喷射能力，最高护甲。高伤害重型武器。兵种连杀奖励：歌利亚。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_EXO_LAUNCHER: 选择外骨骼发射器装备，如破片手雷、闪光弹、脉冲弹和变种手雷。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_EXO_LIGHT: 最快移动速度，全套喷射能力，最低护甲。可使用冲锋枪和突击步枪。兵种连杀奖励：无人机。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_EXO_STATS: 升级你的外骨骼武器熟练度、护甲和外骨骼电池。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_EXO_SUPPORT: 正常移动速度，有限喷射能力，正常护甲。可使用霰弹枪和狙击步枪。兵种连杀奖励：哨戒炮。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_HEAVY_SCORESTREAK_UPGRADE: 升级重型外骨骼内置的XS1火神连杀奖励。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_LIGHT_SCORESTREAK_UPGRADE: 升级轻型外骨骼的内置无人机连杀奖励。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_PERK_DUALPRIMARY: 增加将手枪替换为第二把主武器的能力。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_PERK_WEAPONSFREE: 解除每兵种的武器类型限制。解锁所有武器。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_PROFICIENCY_BATTERY: 提高外骨骼装甲电池的最大容量，增加光学迷彩、悬浮等外骨骼能力的持续时间。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_PROFICIENCY_REGEN: 提高已消耗生命值的恢复速度。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_PROFICIENCY_WEAP: 提高武器伤害、射速和/或精度。
schinese.HORDE_DESC_RESISTANCE_ENERGY: 减少来自敌方能量武器的伤害。

schinese.LUA_MENU_ARMORY_CATEGORY_ALL_DESC: 全部战利品包含可兑换战利品、限时战利品和永久战利品。
schinese.LUA_MENU_ARMORY_CATEGORY_PERMANENT_DESC: 永久战利品包含无法兑换为经验值的物品。永久战利品不占用可兑换战利品的槽位。
schinese.LUA_MENU_ARMORY_CATEGORY_REDEEMABLE_DESC: 可兑换战利品包含可兑换为经验值的物品。军械库默认最多可存放84件可兑换战利品。更多槽位可在游戏内商店购买。
schinese.LUA_MENU_ARMORY_CATEGORY_TIME_LIMITED_DE: 限时战利品包含如果不使用就会过期的物品。
schinese.LUA_MENU_ARMORY_FULL_EXTRA: 军械库已满 · &&1/&&2（额外物品保留在新物品中）

schinese.LUA_MENU_ASD_MEGAPACK_RECEIVED_MESSAGE: 你已成功购买高级补给包（40抽）。你的物品已添加到"新物品"队列。
schinese.LUA_MENU_ASSAULT_DESC: 全能配置。几乎任何距离都有效。
schinese.LUA_MENU_AUTO_MANTLE_DESC: 在靠近边缘时自动翻越。
schinese.LUA_MENU_AUTO_WEAPON_SWITCH_DESC: 弹药耗尽时自动切换武器。
schinese.LUA_MENU_BATTLECHATTER_DESC: 启用或禁用玩家语音，独立于服务器设置。
schinese.LUA_MENU_BOTS_DESC: 设置比赛中的机器人数量。
schinese.LUA_MENU_CHECK_HOW_YOUR_SCORE: 查看您的分数在好友和全球中的排名。
schinese.LUA_MENU_CHOOSE_LANGUAGE_DESC: 选择您的语言。仅在单人游戏主菜单可用。
schinese.LUA_MENU_CLAN_CLAN_INVITES_DESC: 在此查看您的战队邀请。
schinese.LUA_MENU_CLASSIFIED_DESC: 查看已解锁的机密报告。

Skylanders Universe Accounts do not collect personally identifying information (such as names or addresses) and are not subject to an age restriction but do require the consent and approval of a parent or guardian who must agree and accept via email confirmation the terms of this Agreement and the Activision Privacy Policy on behalf of their child as part of the Skylanders Universe Account registration process.


8.4 ACCOUNT SUSPENSION/TERMINATION
ACTIVISION MAY SUSPEND, TERMINATE, MODIFY, OR DELETE ANY ACCOUNT AT ANY TIME FOR ANY REASON OR FOR NO REASON, WITH OR WITHOUT NOTICE TO YOU, TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW.  For purposes of explanation and not limitation, many Account suspensions, terminations and/or deletions may be the result of violations of this Agreement.

8.5 SOCIAL MEDIA
If you are a registered user of social media sites you may be able to connect your social media account and your Activision Account (if your applicable Activision Account has this functionality enabled). If you do this, you may use your social media data to enable you to find your social media “friends”, and your “friends” can use their social media data to find you, on your Activision account.

If you connect your Facebook account to an Activision Account, such as Call of Duty Elite or Activate, your Facebook friends will be able to associate your screen name on your Activision Account with your real name on your Facebook account when they use the Facebook “friends” feature. Your social media accounts are subject to their own Third Party Terms (in relation to Facebook see also Facebook’s Statement of Rights and Responsibilities which can be found on Facebook’s website). You acknowledge and agree that your social media account provider (including without limitation Facebook) is not responsible for your Activision Account, including for any liability connected to  your use of your Activision Account, and that irrespective of whether you use an anonymous gamertag or username, once connect your Activision Account to your social media account, your real name will be available and viewable by your social media “friends”. Please also see Activision’s Privacy Policy for additional information on social networks.


8.6 USERNAMES AND GROUP DESIGNATIONS:
Depending on which Product and platform (e.g console or mobile phone operating system) you are using, your username on the platform may be your username in the Activision account.   Additionally, some Activision accounts may allow users to form different “clans”, “squads”, “teams”, or other groups (collectively “groups”) with unique group names. When you choose a username or a group name, or otherwise create a label that can be seen by other users, you must abide by the following guidelines as well as the rules of common decency.  If Activision finds such a name to be offensive or improper, it may, in its sole and absolute discretion, change or remove the name, and/or suspend or terminate your use of the service.  In particular, you may not use any name:

A. Belonging to another person with the intent to impersonate that person, including without limitation any Product administrators or any other employee or agent of Activision;

B. That incorporates vulgar language or which is otherwise offensive, defamatory, obscene, hateful, or racially, sexually, ethnically or otherwise objectionable;

C. That is subject to the rights of any other person or entity without written authorization from that person or entity;

D. That belongs or refers to a popular culture figure, celebrity, media personality, icon or persona;

E. That is, contains, or is substantially similar to a trademark or service mark, whether registered or not;

F. Belonging to any religious figure or deity; or

G. Related to drugs, sex, alcohol, or criminal activity.

You may not use a misspelling or an alternative spelling to circumvent the name restrictions listed above, nor can you have a "first" and "last" name that, when combined, violate the above name restrictions.

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, you are responsible for all use of your Account.  You must notify Activision immediately of any unauthorized use of your username, password, account information, or any other breach of security that you become aware of relating to your Account.  Such notification should be made via the Customer Support web page at www.support.activision.com.


8.7 CERTAIN CALL OF DUTY ELITE TERMS 

A. Without limiting the terms contained herein, your use of the Call of Duty Elite Product is also governed by the Call of Duty Software License Agreement (“SLA”) that accompanies the games for which the Product is enabled.  The SLA governs your use of the game, and this Agreement governs your use of Call of Duty Elite, regardless of the platform on which you use Call of Duty Elite (e.g. console, online, mobile, etc.). Your use of Call of Duty Elite is also governed by, and conditional upon, your having a valid console ID online account with Call of Duty multiplayer functionality, and compliance with such account’s own terms of service.

These contests and sweepstakes are governed by specific rules and a code of conduct (which are incorporated by reference into this Agreement), which will be posted in connection with the applicable contest, sweepstakes or elsewhere on Call of Duty Elite.  Your participation in a contest or sweepstakes is conditioned upon your acceptance of those terms. For select contests and sweepstakes, Activision reserves the right to limit the quantity of prizes a participant may win during a certain period of time. Before participating in a contest or sweepstakes, it is your responsibility to carefully review the applicable rules and enlistment information for such contest or sweepstakes to confirm whether you are eligible to win the applicable prizes.  Winners who are ineligible or unable to claim or use their prizes are not entitled to any substitute prizes or accommodations.  Eligibility for contests and sweepstakes may be restricted to participants of the same age or older than the age rating applicable to the relevant supported Call of Duty game (e.g. Call of Duty: Black Ops II rated ESRB 17 for the United States of America; PEGI 18 for the European Union (excluding Germany); USK 18 for Germany; ACB 15 for Australia). For participants from eligible countries without any applicable age ratings system, Activision may apply a minimum age requirement of 18 years of age in line with the PEGI and USK age ratings. Minimum age requirements will be specified prior to the point of entry of the applicable contest or sweepstakes and will form a condition of entry to that contest or sweepstakes. Availability, frequency and eligibility of contests and sweepstakes shall be at Activision’s sole discretion and is subject also to local laws and restrictions.  

C. By joining a Call of Duty Elite clan, you agree that your clan leader is authorized to enter your clan in one or more contests, such entry to be made on behalf of the clan and all of its individual members. 

D. Remember to take frequent breaks when you engage in contests, play any Activision games and use Call of Duty Elite.

9.1 “Service Provided Content" consists of those materials provided to Product users (with or without an Account as applicable) such as unlockable content, virtual assets, codes, achievements, etc. You understand that while at times you may “earn” "buy" or "purchase" “Service Provided Content”; you do not in fact own or have any property interest in the ”Service Provided Content” and the price of any ”Service Provided Content” does not refer to any credit balance of real currency or its equivalent. The arbitrator, and not any federal, state or local court or agency, shall have exclusive authority to resolve all disputes arising out of or relating to the interpretation, applicability, enforceability or formation of this Agreement, including, but not limited to any claim that all or any part of this Agreement is void or voidable, or whether a claim is subject to arbitration. Any collection of information obtained offline will also be in compliance with applicable data protection law.
 
Activision is a licensee of the ESRB's Privacy Online Program. If you believe that we have not responded to your inquiry or your inquiry has not been satisfactorily addressed, please contact ESRB at 

http://www.esrb.org/privacy/contact.jsp
 
ESRB
Attn.:Privacy Online Program
317 Madison Avenue , 22nd Floor
New York , NY 10017
privacy@esrb.org

What information does Activision collect? 
 
Activision only collects personal information from you on a voluntary basis. When you submit personal information to Activision, it will usually take the form of: (1) Web site registration; (2) contests and promotions; (3) customer service; (4) demo downloads; (5) purchase of a product or service through our online stores; (6) use of a website or other online property (including Online Services (as defined below)); (7) online submission of your résumé for job openings. The information we collect may include personal information such as your name, e-mail address, phone number, and home address. In addition, we may collect demographic information such as your age, gender and interests.  We may also obtain information about you from other sources, as far as such other sources are legally entitled to share such information, and combine that information with information we have collected from you. 
 
* Web Site Registration  
Activision may collect personal information from you when registering as a website or other online property member, including your name, address, e-mail address, and phone number. We may also collect demographic information such as your gender and birth date, which we may combine with your personal information and use it for marketing purposes. Once this information is combined it is all considered personal information. Information collected from those who register on our websites or other online properties is used to provide registrants the benefits associated with such registration (e.g., subscription to newsletters; access to the latest game news and contests; message boards, chat rooms or forums; and product registration.). From time to time, we may contact you to ask you for your opinion about certain matters in the form of online polls or surveys, including your opinion with respect to our games or other products and services. Your responses to these polls help us provide products and services of interest to you.
 
* Contests and Promotions 
From time to time, Activision may run contests or promotions on our websites and other online properties and collect certain personal information in connection with such event. The information may include your name, address, e-mail address, phone number, and birth date. This information will be used only for the purpose of your participation in product-specific contests and promotions as well as informing you of upcoming products and services. 
 
* Customer Service 
In order to provide you with the best possible customer service, Activision may collect some personal information from you including your name, e-mail address and birth date. This information will be used only for the purpose of solving your customer support inquiry and will be saved for twelve (12) months in the event additional customer support requests arise. 
 
* Demo Downloads/Mature-Rated Content 
Visitors interested in accessing Mature-rated content or downloading demonstration versions of Activision games with an ESRB rating of "M" (Mature) or PEGI 18 may need to provide a valid credit card number and expiration date. Such information will be used only for the purpose of verifying age and will not be stored. 
 
* Résumés 
Activision allows for the online submission of résumés. Personal information collected in association with résumés will be used solely for the purpose of accepting and evaluating candidate submissions for job postings. This information may only be shared within the Activision group if you have given your prior consent or if the respective job relates to another company within the Activision group. Information collected in association with résumés is not subject to the terms of this Online Privacy Statement. 
 
*Online Services
Activision may provide you with a variety of online services such as accounts, and online games (“Online Services”).  Activision may collect non-personal information from you, such as scores, rankings, game play statistics, game feature usages, and achievements.  We may also collect information stored in your account preferences and online profiles, including, for example, your purchases and friends lists.  Activision may combine non-personal information with personal information in order to tailor advertisements, web pages, game play experiences, products, virtual goods and Online Services for you.
Further, use of certain features of Online Services, such as messages boards, profiles, and contributing user generated content, may involve disclosure of personal information about you by you. You acknowledge that you have no right or expectation of privacy or confidentiality when using such features of Online Services.  
In some instances, we may use a third party gaming service to provide authentication for Online Services, and in such case you may be asked to provide your account information associated with that third party service when signing up for Online Services. In addition, if registering for Online Services directly from a third-party gaming service, certain membership information there will be transferred automatically to Activision when you register.

* Purchase of goods or services through our online store

Visitors purchasing goods and services through one of our affiliate online stores will need to provide a valid credit card number and expiration date, in addition to name, e-mail address, phone number, and home address. Whatever the activity may be, we will only collect information to the extent deemed reasonably necessary to fulfill your requests and legitimate business objectives as permitted under applicable data protection legislation.  
Activision may, from time to time, offer you the ability to send an e-mail to friends or family by using our "send-a-friend" tool.  Any information entered for "send-a-friend" messages are used only to send the requested message; we delete both sender and recipient e-mail addresses after sending the message. In using our “send-a-friend” tool you confirm that you and party to whom you are sending the message know each other.
 
What happens if I refuse to provide my personal information? 
 
If you do not want to submit personal information that is necessary to provide the service or to fulfill your request, you will not be able to access and/or participate in certain activities. For example, you will not be able to register on Activision.com or participate in certain contests and promotions or access and/or use other online features or Online Services. In addition, your refusal to submit personal information may limit our ability to respond to your customer support inquiry in a timely fashion.
COOKIES
What are “Cookies” and does Activision use cookies, track IP Addresses, or use other passive means to collect information? 
Activision uses cookies on its websites and other online properties. A "cookie" is a small bit of record-keeping information that many websites and other online properties often store on a user's computer or device in order to anonymously identify it and associate activity with it. Cookies typically do not include people's names, or e-mail addresses. 

When visiting our websites and other online services you can choose whether or not to let us enable cookies. We use cookies to optimize your visit, make your browsing experience as effective as possible, and let you know about offers that we think will interest you. This means that if you refuse, your use of our websites and other online properties may be impaired as a result.

Depending on the Activision website or other online property you are using, and the country you are based in, cookies may be set on your computer or device by either:

Activision - to recognize and associate activity with your computer or device when it visits an Activision website or other online property.  Activision cookies cannot be used to recognize or associate activity with your computer or device when it visits other, third party websites or online properties. 

Third Parties – to enable third party features or functionality to be provided on or through Activision's websites or other online properties (e.g. advertising and analytics).  The third parties that set these cookies can recognize your computer or device both when it visits Activision websites or other online properties in question and also when it visits certain other non-Activision websites or online properties that use the third party's features and functionality
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT7:
Types Of Cookies

* Strictly Necessary Cookies
	These cookies are essential in order to enable you to move around websites or online properties and use their features, such as accessing secure areas of a website. Without these cookies, services you have asked for, like secure login areas, cannot be provided.

* Performance (or Analytics) Cookies
These cookies collect information about how visitors use a website or online property, for instance which pages visitors go to most often, and if they get error messages from web pages.  These cookies don’t collect information that identifies a visitor. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. They are only used to improve how a website or other online property works. We generally contract with independent research and measurement companies, such as Google Analytics, to provide these services on our behalf and which may also be subject to their own privacy policies.

* Functionality Cookies
	These cookies allow the website or online property to remember choices you make (such as your user name, language or the region you are in) and provide enhanced, more personal features. These cookies can also be used to remember changes you have made to text size, fonts and other parts of web pages that you can customize. They may also be used to provide services you have asked for such as watching a video. The information these cookies collect may be anonymized and they cannot track your browsing activity on other websites.

* Advertising Cookies
o These cookies are used to deliver adverts more relevant to you and your interests. They are also used to limit the number of times you see an advertisement as well as help measure the effectiveness of the advertising campaign. They are usually placed by advertising networks with the website or online property operator’s permission. They remember that you have visited a website and this information is shared with other organizations such as advertisers. Quite often advertising cookies will be linked to site functionality provided by the other organization. In certain countries our websites may partner with third party online advertising and analytics companies to tailor and deliver advertisements, products, services, and promotions on our websites and other online properties, as well as advertisements, products, services, and promotions on websites and other online properties which we do not control. To help select the ads of greatest interest to you, these companies may use cookies, Flash technology, and similar technologies to collect and track non-personal information such as demographic information (e.g., gender, occupation, etc.), aggregated information, search keywords, geo-location and online data (for example, clickstream data such as browser type, language, IP address, time/date) to select advertisements that are more relevant to your interests, to better personalize the experience for you and tailor advertisements. In some instances, we may allow third-party companies to collect certain anonymous information when you visit our website. These companies may use non-personally identifiable information during your visits to this and other websites in order to provide third party advertisements about goods and services likely to be of greater interest to you. These companies typically use a cookie or a third party web beacon to collect this information. 

o To learn more about Advertising Cookies  visit the Network Advertising Initiative (NAI) at http://networkadvertising.org or http://youronlinechoices.com  

Managing Cookies

You can review your options to manage cookies by:

* by clicking on the opt out links provided in Appendix 1 at the end of this Privacy Policy 

* by opening the “Help” menu on the browser menu bar. Most browsers will tell you how you can disable or delete cookies or set your browser to alert you when cookies are being sent to your computer. 

* visiting http://networkadvertising.org/managing/opt_out.asp and/or http://youronlinechoices.com for choices to opt out of advertising

If you reject all cookies, you may not be able to use certain features of our websites and other online properties (including sign in). 

Permission to Use Cookies

By using our websites and other online properties you agree, and we will assume you consent, to receive cookies through our websites and online properties unless you manage your cookie choices by one of the means set out above. 

If a cookies choice setting is not available through either the third party provider listed in Appendix 1, your browser, or at http://networkadvertising.org/managing/opt_out.asp or http://youronlinechoices.com then by using the applicable Activision website or other online property you agree, and we will assume you consent, to receive cookies through that Activision website or other online property. Please also note that the use of information obtained by third party providers listed in Appendix 1 through cookies placed by them is also subject to their own privacy policies.
If you have a registration account with us, information collected by cookies may be associated with your registration account.

Flash cookies and web beacons

Adobe Flash Player is an application that allows sites to deploy dynamic web content. Adobe Flash and similar applications use technology to remember settings, preferences, and usage in ways that are similar to browser cookies, but are managed through a different interface than your web browser. You can access your Flash management tools from http://www.adobe.com/ directly to manage your cookie settings.
From time to time, we may use web beacons (or clear GIFs) on our websites or other online properties or include them in the e-mail messages we send you. Web beacons (also known as "web bugs") are small strings of code that provide a method of delivering a graphic image on a web page or in an email message for the purpose of transferring data. We use web beacons for many purposes, including site traffic reporting, unique visitor counts, advertising and email auditing and reporting, and personalization. 
We also keep track of Internet Protocol (IP) addresses. An IP address is a number that is used by computers on the network to identify your computer every time you log on to the Internet. 
Activision may use and share non-personally identifiable (e.g., anonymized or aggregated) information obtained from cookies with third parties such as service providers or advertising partners. An example of the use of such information would be an anonymous group that we assign to an interest categories or segment such as region, gaming preferences, or a combination. We may also share non-personally identifiable information obtained from cookies with third parties such as service providers or advertising networks in order to permit them to provide services on our behalf or to partner with us in selecting and serving advertisements for us or our advertising partners. 
Social Network Sites
If you have signed in to a social networking site, such as Facebook, it may have set a cookie on your device which recognizes you when you view content on our websites and other online properties. These cookies allow you to share content across social media via the use of sharing settings.  See your social networking site’s Terms of Use and Privacy Policy for details. For additional details, please see the Social Media Note below.
More Information

If you would like to find out more about cookies you may find the following link useful:

http://www.allaboutcookies.org/ 
 
Who is collecting my personal information and how will it be used? 
 
The information you submit to our websites and other online properties is collected and used by Activision Publishing, Inc., 3100 Ocean Park Boulevard, Santa Monica, CA 90405, USA. European Union
If you are visitor to our websites or other online properties from a member state of the European Union, then the information you submit is collected and used by Activision Blizzard UK Limited of 3 Roundwood Avenue, Stockley Park, Uxbridge, UB11 1AF, England. Activision Blizzard UK Limited is registered as data controller with the UK Information Commissioner’s Office with registration number Z1095341. If you have any questions about how Activision Blizzard UK Limited uses and protects your personal information you can contact us in writing at the above address (Attention: Legal & Business Affairs/Privacy Policy) or call us on 00 44 203 060 1000.  
Activision may disclose personal information to vendors or employ vendors to collect personal information on Activision's behalf. These vendors provide internal support to our websites and other online properties by operating some of the services we provide you (“vendors”). When requesting these services, you may be asked to supply your name, address, e-mail address, and/or other personal information. Activision does not allow vendors to share such information with any other party unless reasonably necessary to provide the service or use such information for any other purposes, and requires them to adhere to Activision's Privacy Policy and where applicable data processing agreements concluded between Activision and such vendors. 
 
In addition, if you are a visitor to our websites and other online properties from outside the U.S., the personal information you provide may be collected, processed and stored directly on servers in the United States or other countries where Activision or our affiliates, subsidiaries, agents or vendors maintain facilities or business operations; collected, processed and stored on servers in other countries and then transferred to servers in the United States or other countries where Activision or our affiliates, subsidiaries, agents or vendors maintain facilities or business operations.  If you do not agree to the collection, processing, storage and transfer of your information, please do not provide your information when requested and stop using our websites and other online properties.

With whom does Activision share my personal information? 
 
Activision does not share or sell your personal information with outside third parties for those third parties to use for their own purposes without your agreement. Activision discloses personal information only in accordance with this Privacy Policy with:
* Vendors as set out above
* Other third parties as necessary to complete any transaction through our websites or other online properties and/or provide Online Services you have requested. 
Notwithstanding, you agree we may disclose personal information in the good faith belief that we are required to do so by law, including but not limited to disclosure to law enforcement or other government officials in connection with an investigation of fraud, intellectual property infringements, or other activity that is illegal or may expose you or us to legal liability. We may review your gameplay and other account information in order to investigate allegations of cheating, hacking or any other breach or alleged breach of any applicable Terms of Use or this Privacy Policy and disclose your personal information to our legal advisors, consultants and law enforcement or other government officials.  In addition, in the event of a merger, acquisition, reorganization, bankruptcy, or other similar event, Activision's customer information including personal information may be transferred to our successor or assign. 
 
Please note that any information, including personally identifiable information that you reveal in a bulletin board, message board, chat room or other public forum is publicly viewable. 
 
Can I choose how my personal information is used? 
 
If you want to remove yourself from individual contests or promotions, or from receiving e-mail newsletters from Activision, simply click the unsubscribe link in the email newsletter or access your account from http://www.activision.com/ and edit/delete your information. You will need your password to access your personal account. If you do not want Activision to reply to your customer support inquiry, you may opt-out from receiving a response by contacting us by regular mail at: Activision Publishing, Inc., 3100 Ocean Park Boulevard, Santa Monica, CA 90405 USA, ATTN: Business and Legal Affairs/Privacy Policy. We will be happy to honor your request. However, notwithstanding any removals under this paragraph, you acknowledge and agree there may be certain instances where we may elect to notify you about your account itself, such as to inform you that your account may be expiring or provide you with other relevant information about your account.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT8:
*Your California Privacy Rights
 
Since 2005, California Civil Code Section 1798.83 permits our customers who are California residents to request certain information regarding our disclosure of personal information to third parties for their direct marketing purposes.  We do not share our customer's personal information with unaffiliated third parties for their own direct marketing purposes.  For inquiries regarding our disclosure policy, please send us an e-mail to websitedisclosurepolicy@activision.com, or write us at : Activision Publishing, Inc., 3100 Ocean Park Boulevard, Santa Monica, CA 90405 USA, ATTN: Business and Legal Affairs/Privacy Policy. We will be happy to honor your request.
 *Social Media Note
You also can engage with our content on or through third-party social networking sites, such as Facebook and Twitter (or third-party social media plug-ins and applications) ("Social Media").  When you engage with our content on or through Social Media, you may allow us to have access to certain information from your Social Media profile (e.g., name, e-mail address, photo, gender, birthday, location, your list of friends, people you follow and/or who follow you, the posts or the ‘likes’ you make) to deliver the content or as part of the operation of the application.  We may also obtain other information from your interaction with our content (e.g., content viewed, game performance, high scores, and information about advertisements within the content you have been shown or may have clicked on). 

When you provide information from your Social Media account, it can help enable us to do things like (1) give you exclusive content, (2) personalize your online experience with us within and outside our websites (and/or applications), and (3) contact you in accordance with your marketing preferences through the social networking sites or directly by sending you the latest news, special offerings, and rewards.  By doing so, you consent to the use of this information in accordance with our Privacy Policy.  When you post personal information publicly through our websites or other online properties,  or on social networking sites, it may be publicly viewed by other members of these sites and we cannot prevent further use of the information by third parties. 
Social Media sites and applications will often allow you to control what data you share by changing your privacy settings with that Social Meda site or application.  For more information about how your Social Media sites and applications use and protect your personal information, please refer to their privacy policies and terms of use.
*Mobile Application Partners
We partner with certain mobile analytics, advertising, and technology partners, which may include, but not be limited to SWRVE New Media , Flurry, Kochava and others. Such mobile partners may use a tracking pixel, agent or any other visitor identification technology that collects, uses, shares and stores data about end users and digital ad campaigns promoting our mobile apps, and by choosing to use Activision mobile apps you hereby consent to such activities. Please see Appendix 1 of this Activision Privacy Policy for details of those partners privacy policies and opt out options.
*How do I access my personal information? 
 
If for any reason you wish to view, correct or delete the personal information collected about you simply access your account from the Web site or http://www.activision.com/ and edit/delete your information as necessary. You will need your password to access your personal account.  You may also send us an email asking us to delete your account at removeaccount@activision.com.  In the alternative, you may write to us at Activision Publishing, Inc., 3100 Ocean Park Boulevard, Santa Monica, CA 90405 USA, ATTN: Business and Legal Affairs/Privacy Policy (Activision Blizzard UK Limited, 3 Roundwood Avenue, Stockley Park, Uxbridge, UB11 1AF, UK for users from a member state of the European Union). We will be happy to review, update or remove information as appropriate. Residual copies of information that has been deleted from your account may remain in our backup systems for up to 30 days.  In certain cases, we may still retain your information to resolve disputes, enforce our user agreement, or comply with legal requirements; in this case, your personal information will be blocked from use for any other purpose.


 
*Does Activision collect personal information from children under 13? 
 
We do not knowingly collect or store any personally identifiable information such as name, address, or e-mail address from children under 13.
 
We recognize a special obligation to protect personal information obtained from young children. We urge parents to instruct their children to never give out their real names, addresses, or phone numbers, without permission, when on-line. Children under the age of 17 and over the age of 12 should encourage their parents to review this Privacy Policy and to contact us if they would like to evoke our opt-out policy or to raise any concerns. 
 
From time to time, certain portions of our websites and other online properties may allow all users (including children under 13) to disclose a limited amount of personal information without first telling us their age or getting their parent's permission. Such portions of our website operate activities or provide services in a way that does not require prior parental consent.

 
*What safeguards does Activision use to protect my personal information? 
 
Activision takes reasonable steps to ensure data quality such as the accuracy of information obtained from visitors to our websites and other online properties. Activision has also taken reasonable steps to maintain all information collected secure and in its original form, i.e. free from any alteration. Access to all personal information is strictly controlled. In addition, we take reasonable steps to assure that vendors who collect personal information on our behalf provide reasonable levels of protection of personal information.
 
How do I ask a question or file a complaint? 
 
Any questions or complaints about this Privacy Policy can be resolved by addressing written inquires to Activision Publishing, Inc., 3100 Ocean Park Boulevard, Santa Monica, CA 90405, ATTN: Business and Legal Affairs/Privacy Policy, or by calling Business and Legal Affairs/Privacy Policy, ph. (001) 310 255 2000(Activision Blizzard UK Limited, 3 Roundwood Avenue, Stockley Park, Uxbridge, UB11 1AF, UK (ph. 00 44 203 060 1000) for users from a member state of the European Union) .

The arbitrator shall be empowered to grant whatever relief would be available in a court under law or in equity.  The arbitrator’s award shall be binding on the parties and may be entered as a judgment in any court of competent jurisdiction.  The Commercial Arbitration Rules governing the arbitration may be accessed at www.adr.org or by calling the AAA at +1.800.778.7879.

What information does Activision collect? 
 
Activision only collects personal information from you on a voluntary basis. When you submit personal information to Activision, it will usually take the form of: (1) Web site registration; (2) contests and promotions; (3) customer service; (4) demo downloads; (5) purchase of a product or service through our online stores; (6) use of a website or other online property (including Online Services (as defined below)); (7) online submission of your résumé for job openings. The information we collect may include personal information such as your name, e-mail address, phone number, and home address. In addition, we may collect demographic information such as your age, gender and interests.  We may also obtain information about you from other sources, as far as such other sources are legally entitled to share such information, and combine that information with information we have collected from you.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_090:
* Web Site Registration  
Activision may collect personal information from you when registering as a website or other online property member, including your name, address, e-mail address, and phone number. We may also collect demographic information such as your gender and birth date, which we may combine with your personal information and use it for marketing purposes. Once this information is combined it is all considered personal information. Information collected from those who register on our websites or other online properties is used to provide registrants the benefits associated with such registration (e.g., subscription to newsletters; access to the latest game news and contests; message boards, chat rooms or forums; and product registration.).
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_091:
From time to time, we may contact you to ask you for your opinion about certain matters in the form of online polls or surveys, including your opinion with respect to our games or other products and services. Your responses to these polls help us provide products and services of interest to you.
 
* Contests and Promotions 
From time to time, Activision may run contests or promotions on our websites and other online properties and collect certain personal information in connection with such event. The information may include your name, address, e-mail address, phone number, and birth date. This information will be used only for the purpose of your participation in product-specific contests and promotions as well as informing you of upcoming products and services.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_092:
* Customer Service 
In order to provide you with the best possible customer service, Activision may collect some personal information from you including your name, e-mail address and birth date. This information will be used only for the purpose of solving your customer support inquiry and will be saved for twelve (12) months in the event additional customer support requests arise. 
 
* Demo Downloads/Mature-Rated Content 
Visitors interested in accessing Mature-rated content or downloading demonstration versions of Activision games with an ESRB rating of "M" (Mature) or PEGI 18 may need to provide a valid credit card number and expiration date. Such information will be used only for the purpose of verifying age and will not be stored.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_093:
* Résumés 
Activision allows for the online submission of résumés. Personal information collected in association with résumés will be used solely for the purpose of accepting and evaluating candidate submissions for job postings. This information may only be shared within the Activision group if you have given your prior consent or if the respective job relates to another company within the Activision group. Information collected in association with résumés is not subject to the terms of this Online Privacy Statement.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_094:
*Online Services
Activision may provide you with a variety of online services such as accounts, and online games (“Online Services”).  Activision may collect non-personal information from you, such as scores, rankings, game play statistics, game feature usages, and achievements.  We may also collect information stored in your account preferences and online profiles, including, for example, your purchases and friends lists.  Activision may combine non-personal information with personal information in order to tailor advertisements, web pages, game play experiences, products, virtual goods and Online Services for you.
Further, use of certain features of Online Services, such as messages boards, profiles, and contributing user generated content, may involve disclosure of personal information about you by you. You acknowledge that you have no right or expectation of privacy or confidentiality when using such features of Online Services.

* Purchase of goods or services through our online store

Visitors purchasing goods and services through one of our affiliate online stores will need to provide a valid credit card number and expiration date, in addition to name, e-mail address, phone number, and home address. Whatever the activity may be, we will only collect information to the extent deemed reasonably necessary to fulfill your requests and legitimate business objectives as permitted under applicable data protection legislation.
