What happens if I refuse to provide my personal information? 
 
If you do not want to submit personal information that is necessary to provide the service or to fulfill your request, you will not be able to access and/or participate in certain activities. For example, you will not be able to register on Activision.com or participate in certain contests and promotions or access and/or use other online features or Online Services. In addition, your refusal to submit personal information may limit our ability to respond to your customer support inquiry in a timely fashion.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_097:
COOKIES
What are “Cookies” and does Activision use cookies, track IP Addresses, or use other passive means to collect information? 
Activision uses cookies on its websites and other online properties. A "cookie" is a small bit of record-keeping information that many websites and other online properties often store on a user's computer or device in order to anonymously identify it and associate activity with it. Cookies typically do not include people's names, or e-mail addresses. 

When visiting our websites and other online services you can choose whether or not to let us enable cookies. We use cookies to optimize your visit, make your browsing experience as effective as possible, and let you know about offers that we think will interest you. This means that if you refuse, your use of our websites and other online properties may be impaired as a result.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_098:
Depending on the Activision website or other online property you are using, and the country you are based in, cookies may be set on your computer or device by either:

Activision - to recognize and associate activity with your computer or device when it visits an Activision website or other online property.  Activision cookies cannot be used to recognize or associate activity with your computer or device when it visits other, third party websites or online properties. 

Third Parties - to enable third party features or functionality to be provided on or through Activision's websites or other online properties (e.g. advertising and analytics).  The third parties that set these cookies can recognize your computer or device both when it visits Activision websites or other online properties in question and also when it visits certain other non-Activision websites or online properties that use the third party's features and functionality
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_099:
Types Of Cookies

* Strictly Necessary Cookies
	These cookies are essential in order to enable you to move around websites or online properties and use their features, such as accessing secure areas of a website. Without these cookies, services you have asked for, like secure login areas, cannot be provided.

* Performance (or Analytics) Cookies
These cookies collect information about how visitors use a website or online property, for instance which pages visitors go to most often, and if they get error messages from web pages.  These cookies don’t collect information that identifies a visitor. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. They are only used to improve how a website or other online property works. We generally contract with independent research and measurement companies, such as Google Analytics, to provide these services on our behalf and which may also be subject to their own privacy policies.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_100:
* Functionality Cookies
	These cookies allow the website or online property to remember choices you make (such as your user name, language or the region you are in) and provide enhanced, more personal features. These cookies can also be used to remember changes you have made to text size, fonts and other parts of web pages that you can customize. They may also be used to provide services you have asked for such as watching a video. The information these cookies collect may be anonymized and they cannot track your browsing activity on other websites.

* Advertising Cookies
These cookies are used to deliver adverts more relevant to you and your interests. They are also used to limit the number of times you see an advertisement as well as help measure the effectiveness of the advertising campaign.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_101: They are usually placed by advertising networks with the website or online property operator’s permission. They remember that you have visited a website and this information is shared with other organizations such as advertisers. Quite often advertising cookies will be linked to site functionality provided by the other organization. In certain countries our websites may partner with third party online advertising and analytics companies to tailor and deliver advertisements, products, services, and promotions on our websites and other online properties, as well as advertisements, products, services, and promotions on websites and other online properties which we do not control.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_102: To help select the ads of greatest interest to you, these companies may use cookies, Flash technology, and similar technologies to collect and track non-personal information such as demographic information (e.g., gender, occupation, etc.), aggregated information, search keywords, geo-location and online data (for example, clickstream data such as browser type, language, IP address, time/date) to select advertisements that are more relevant to your interests, to better personalize the experience for you and tailor advertisements. In some instances, we may allow third-party companies to collect certain anonymous information when you visit our website. These companies may use non-personally identifiable information during your visits to this and other websites in order to provide third party advertisements about goods and services likely to be of greater interest to you. These companies typically use a cookie or a third party web beacon to collect this information.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_103:
To learn more about Advertising Cookies  visit the Network Advertising Initiative (NAI) at http://networkadvertising.org or http://youronlinechoices.com  

Managing Cookies

You can review your options to manage cookies by:

* by clicking on the opt out links provided in Appendix 1 at the end of this Privacy Policy 

* by opening the “Help” menu on the browser menu bar. Most browsers will tell you how you can disable or delete cookies or set your browser to alert you when cookies are being sent to your computer. 

* visiting http://networkadvertising.org/managing/opt_out.asp and/or http://youronlinechoices.com for choices to opt out of advertising

If you reject all cookies, you may not be able to use certain features of our websites and other online properties (including sign in).
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_104:
Permission to Use Cookies

By using our websites and other online properties you agree, and we will assume you consent, to receive cookies through our websites and online properties unless you manage your cookie choices by one of the means set out above. 

If a cookies choice setting is not available through either the third party provider listed in Appendix 1, your browser, or at http://networkadvertising.org/managing/opt_out.asp or http://youronlinechoices.com then by using the applicable Activision website or other online property you agree, and we will assume you consent, to receive cookies through that Activision website or other online property. Please also note that the use of information obtained by third party providers listed in Appendix 1 through cookies placed by them is also subject to their own privacy policies.
If you have a registration account with us, information collected by cookies may be associated with your registration account.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_105:
Flash cookies and web beacons

Adobe Flash Player is an application that allows sites to deploy dynamic web content. Adobe Flash and similar applications use technology to remember settings, preferences, and usage in ways that are similar to browser cookies, but are managed through a different interface than your web browser. You can access your Flash management tools from http://www.adobe.com/ directly to manage your cookie settings.
From time to time, we may use web beacons (or clear GIFs) on our websites or other online properties or include them in the e-mail messages we send you. Web beacons (also known as "web bugs") are small strings of code that provide a method of delivering a graphic image on a web page or in an email message for the purpose of transferring data.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_106:
We use web beacons for many purposes, including site traffic reporting, unique visitor counts, advertising and email auditing and reporting, and personalization. 
We also keep track of Internet Protocol (IP) addresses. An IP address is a number that is used by computers on the network to identify your computer every time you log on to the Internet.

Activision may use and share non-personally identifiable (e.g., anonymized or aggregated) information obtained from cookies with third parties such as service providers or advertising partners. An example of the use of such information would be an anonymous group that we assign to an interest categories or segment such as region, gaming preferences, or a combination.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_107:
We may also share non-personally identifiable information obtained from cookies with third parties such as service providers or advertising networks in order to permit them to provide services on our behalf or to partner with us in selecting and serving advertisements for us or our advertising partners. 
Social Network Sites
If you have signed in to a social networking site, such as Facebook, it may have set a cookie on your device which recognizes you when you view content on our websites and other online properties. These cookies allow you to share content across social media via the use of sharing settings.  See your social networking site’s Terms of Use and Privacy Policy for details. For additional details, please see the Social Media Note below.
More Information

If you would like to find out more about cookies you may find the following link useful:

http://www.allaboutcookies.org/
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_108:
Who is collecting my personal information and how will it be used? 
 
The information you submit to our websites and other online properties is collected and used by Activision Publishing, Inc., 3100 Ocean Park Boulevard, Santa Monica, CA 90405, USA. European Union
If you are visitor to our websites or other online properties from a member state of the European Union, then the information you submit is collected and used by Activision Blizzard UK Limited of 3 Roundwood Avenue, Stockley Park, Uxbridge, UB11 1AF, England. Activision Blizzard UK Limited is registered as data controller with the UK Information Commissioner’s Office with registration number Z1095341. If you have any questions about how Activision Blizzard UK Limited uses and protects your personal information you can contact us in writing at the above address (Attention: Legal & Business Affairs/Privacy Policy) or call us on 00 44 203 060 1000.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_109: Activision may disclose personal information to vendors or employ vendors to collect personal information on Activision's behalf. These vendors provide internal support to our websites and other online properties by operating some of the services we provide you (“vendors”). When requesting these services, you may be asked to supply your name, address, e-mail address, and/or other personal information. Activision does not allow vendors to share such information with any other party unless reasonably necessary to provide the service or use such information for any other purposes, and requires them to adhere to Activision's Privacy Policy and where applicable data processing agreements concluded between Activision and such vendors.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_110: In addition, if you are a visitor to our websites and other online properties from outside the U.S., the personal information you provide may be collected, processed and stored directly on servers in the United States or other countries where Activision or our affiliates, subsidiaries, agents or vendors maintain facilities or business operations; collected, processed and stored on servers in other countries and then transferred to servers in the United States or other countries where Activision or our affiliates, subsidiaries, agents or vendors maintain facilities or business operations.  If you do not agree to the collection, processing, storage and transfer of your information, please do not provide your information when requested and stop using our websites and other online properties.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_111:
With whom does Activision share my personal information? 
 
Activision does not share or sell your personal information with outside third parties for those third parties to use for their own purposes without your agreement. Activision discloses personal information only in accordance with this Privacy Policy with:
* Vendors as set out above
* Other third parties as necessary to complete any transaction through our websites or other online properties and/or provide Online Services you have requested. 
Notwithstanding, you agree we may disclose personal information in the good faith belief that we are required to do so by law, including but not limited to disclosure to law enforcement or other government officials in connection with an investigation of fraud, intellectual property infringements, or other activity that is illegal or may expose you or us to legal liability.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_112:
We may review your gameplay and other account information in order to investigate allegations of cheating, hacking or any other breach or alleged breach of any applicable Terms of Use or this Privacy Policy and disclose your personal information to our legal advisors, consultants and law enforcement or other government officials.  In addition, in the event of a merger, acquisition, reorganization, bankruptcy, or other similar event, Activision's customer information including personal information may be transferred to our successor or assign. 
 
Please note that any information, including personally identifiable information that you reveal in a bulletin board, message board, chat room or other public forum is publicly viewable.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_113:
Can I choose how my personal information is used? 
 
If you want to remove yourself from individual contests or promotions, or from receiving e-mail newsletters from Activision, simply click the unsubscribe link in the email newsletter or access your account from http://www.activision.com/ and edit/delete your information. You will need your password to access your personal account. If you do not want Activision to reply to your customer support inquiry, you may opt-out from receiving a response by contacting us by regular mail at: Activision Publishing, Inc., 3100 Ocean Park Boulevard, Santa Monica, CA 90405 USA, ATTN: Business and Legal Affairs/Privacy Policy. We will be happy to honor your request. However, notwithstanding any removals under this paragraph, you acknowledge and agree there may be certain instances where we may elect to notify you about your account itself, such as to inform you that your account may be expiring or provide you with other relevant information about your account.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_114:
*Your California Privacy Rights
 
Since 2005, California Civil Code Section 1798.83 permits our customers who are California residents to request certain information regarding our disclosure of personal information to third parties for their direct marketing purposes.  We do not share our customer's personal information with unaffiliated third parties for their own direct marketing purposes.  For inquiries regarding our disclosure policy, please send us an e-mail to websitedisclosurepolicy@activision.com, or write us at : Activision Publishing, Inc., 3100 Ocean Park Boulevard, Santa Monica, CA 90405 USA, ATTN: Business and Legal Affairs/Privacy Policy. We will be happy to honor your request.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_115:
*Social Media Note
You also can engage with our content on or through third-party social networking sites, such as Facebook and Twitter (or third-party social media plug-ins and applications) ("Social Media").  When you engage with our content on or through Social Media, you may allow us to have access to certain information from your Social Media profile (e.g., name, e-mail address, photo, gender, birthday, location, your list of friends, people you follow and/or who follow you, the posts or the ‘likes’ you make) to deliver the content or as part of the operation of the application.  We may also obtain other information from your interaction with our content (e.g., content viewed, game performance, high scores, and information about advertisements within the content you have been shown or may have clicked on).
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_116:
When you provide information from your Social Media account, it can help enable us to do things like (1) give you exclusive content, (2) personalize your online experience with us within and outside our websites (and/or applications), and (3) contact you in accordance with your marketing preferences through the social networking sites or directly by sending you the latest news, special offerings, and rewards.  By doing so, you consent to the use of this information in accordance with our Privacy Policy.  When you post personal information publicly through our websites or other online properties,  or on social networking sites, it may be publicly viewed by other members of these sites and we cannot prevent further use of the information by third parties. 
Social Media sites and applications will often allow you to control what data you share by changing your privacy settings with that Social Meda site or application.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_117:
For more information about how your Social Media sites and applications use and protect your personal information, please refer to their privacy policies and terms of use.

*Mobile Application Partners
We partner with certain mobile analytics, advertising, and technology partners, which may include, but not be limited to SWRVE New Media , Flurry, Kochava and others. Such mobile partners may use a tracking pixel, agent or any other visitor identification technology that collects, uses, shares and stores data about end users and digital ad campaigns promoting our mobile apps, and by choosing to use Activision mobile apps you hereby consent to such activities. Please see Appendix 1 of this Activision Privacy Policy for details of those partners privacy policies and opt out options.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_118:
*How do I access my personal information? 
If for any reason you wish to view, correct or delete the personal information collected about you simply access your account from the Web site or http://www.activision.com/ and edit/delete your information as necessary. You will need your password to access your personal account.  You may also send us an email asking us to delete your account at removeaccount@activision.com.  In the alternative, you may write to us at Activision Publishing, Inc., 3100 Ocean Park Boulevard, Santa Monica, CA 90405 USA, ATTN: Business and Legal Affairs/Privacy Policy (Activision Blizzard UK Limited, 3 Roundwood Avenue, Stockley Park, Uxbridge, UB11 1AF, UK for users from a member state of the European Union). We will be happy to review, update or remove information as appropriate. Residual copies of information that has been deleted from your account may remain in our backup systems for up to 30 days.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_119:
In certain cases, we may still retain your information to resolve disputes, enforce our user agreement, or comply with legal requirements; in this case, your personal information will be blocked from use for any other purpose.

*Does Activision collect personal information from children under 13? 
 
We do not knowingly collect or store any personally identifiable information such as name, address, or e-mail address from children under 13.
 
We recognize a special obligation to protect personal information obtained from young children. We urge parents to instruct their children to never give out their real names, addresses, or phone numbers, without permission, when on-line. Children under the age of 17 and over the age of 12 should encourage their parents to review this Privacy Policy and to contact us if they would like to evoke our opt-out policy or to raise any concerns.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_120:
From time to time, certain portions of our websites and other online properties may allow all users (including children under 13) to disclose a limited amount of personal information without first telling us their age or getting their parent's permission. Such portions of our website operate activities or provide services in a way that does not require prior parental consent.

*What safeguards does Activision use to protect my personal information? 
 
Activision takes reasonable steps to ensure data quality such as the accuracy of information obtained from visitors to our websites and other online properties. Activision has also taken reasonable steps to maintain all information collected secure and in its original form, i.e. free from any alteration. Access to all personal information is strictly controlled. In addition, we take reasonable steps to assure that vendors who collect personal information on our behalf provide reasonable levels of protection of personal information.
schinese.LUA_MENU_CODA_AGREEMENT_TEXT_121:
How do I ask a question or file a complaint? 
 
Any questions or complaints about this Privacy Policy can be resolved by addressing written inquires to Activision Publishing, Inc., 3100 Ocean Park Boulevard, Santa Monica, CA 90405, ATTN: Business and Legal Affairs/Privacy Policy, or by calling Business and Legal Affairs/Privacy Policy, ph. (001) 310 255 2000(Activision Blizzard UK Limited, 3 Roundwood Avenue, Stockley Park, Uxbridge, UB11 1AF, UK (ph. 00 44 203 060 1000) for users from a member state of the European Union) .

schinese.LUA_MENU_WELCOME_NOOB_MESSAGE:
On behalf of the entire development team, thank you for playing Call of Duty: Advanced Warfare. Sledgehammer Games began development of this game three years ago with a singular commitment to delivering innovation and a new era of multiplayer for you, the loyal fans of Call of Duty.  We have made the biggest fundamental change in the player movement and mechanics set in over a decade and encourage you to explore and enjoy the power of the Exoskeleton, with unprecedented speed, verticality, and evasive maneuvering never before seen in Call of Duty.

Thanks again, and see you online!

Sledgehammer Games

schinese.MENU_SP_S1_AFTERMATH_END_DESC: 你已抓获Hades的得力助手Pierre Danois博士，他正被带回审讯。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_BASE_DESC: 与你的老队长Cormack重逢，你加入了哨兵小队。潜入Irons的私人庄园，收集关于他下一步行动的情报。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_BASE_END_DESC: 作为哨兵特工的首个任务成功了。你在Irons的飞机上安装了追踪器，飞机上携带着名为曼提柯尔的东西。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_BETRAYAL_DESC: 一次震惊的发现导致了绝望的逃亡……
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_BETRAYAL_END_DESC: 你与Ilona在老队长Cormack的帮助下逃离了新巴格达。你正被带往一个未知地点接受汇报。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_CAPTURED_DESC: 在曼提柯尔袭击之后，你的队伍被俘了。与Gideon一起逃离战俘营。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_CAPTURED_END_DESC: 在Gideon和Ilona的帮助下，你已逃离战俘营，正飞速返回新巴格达阻止曼提柯尔发射。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_CRASH_SITE_DESC: 在阿特拉斯部队拦截之前找回曼提柯尔样本。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_CRASH_SITE_END_DESC: 你已在Gideon的意外帮助下找回曼提柯尔货物。他已倒戈，掌握着能帮助你们对抗阿特拉斯的关键情报。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_DOGFIGHT_DESC: 在美国攻击伊拉克新巴格达的阿特拉斯总部之际，你的队伍必须飞入城市并试图抓捕Jonathan Irons。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_DOGFIGHT_END_DESC: Irons对美国部队释放了曼提柯尔病毒。由于你曾是阿特拉斯特工而接种过疫苗得以幸免，但你的队伍已被俘。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_FINALE_DESC: 进攻阿特拉斯指挥中心，阻止曼提柯尔发射。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_FINALE_END_DESC: 曼提柯尔发射已被阻止，Irons也走到了尽头。新巴格达之战结束了，但对抗阿特拉斯公司的战争仍在继续……
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_FUSION_DESC: 阻止KVA在美国核电站引发熔毁。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_FUSION_END_DESC: KVA成功引发了核电站熔毁。你的小队及时逃脱，但这场灾难的后果是灾难性的。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_LAB_DESC: 哨兵发现了隐藏在保加利亚森林中的曼提柯尔设施的位置。潜入设施并摧毁该武器。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_LAB_END_DESC: 曼提柯尔仓库已被摧毁，你已找回能向世界揭露Irons大规模杀伤性武器设施的情报。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_LAGOS_DESC: 作为阿特拉斯特工，你的小队必须从全球恐怖组织KVA手中救出尼日利亚总理。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_LAGOS_END_DESC: 拉各斯的任务成功了。Gideon的队伍已从KVA手中救出了总理和技师。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_LEVELS_ACT1: 《使命召唤：高级战争》关卡 第一幕
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_LEVELS_ACT2: 《使命召唤：高级战争》关卡 第二幕
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_LEVELS_ACT3: 《使命召唤：高级战争》关卡 第三幕
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_MANHUNT_DESC: 你的队伍得知KVA首领Hades正在希腊圣托里尼参加一个会议。跟踪他并拿下他。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_MANHUNT_END_DESC: Hades死了。他最后的遗言是一个谜，正如他临死前交给你的数据驱动器中的内容一样……
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_RECOVERY_DESC: 在你最好朋友的葬礼上，你遇到了Jonathan Irons。他向你提供了阿特拉斯公司的第二次机会。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_RECOVERY_END_DESC: 你已向Jonathan Irons证明了自己，准备执行作为阿特拉斯特工的首次任务。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_SEOUL_DESC: 朝鲜入侵韩国首都首尔。在你作为美国海军陆战队员的首次任务中，你的小队必须帮助击退入侵者并夺回城市。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_SEOUL_END_DESC: 獾小队已帮助击退了朝鲜的入侵。城市获救了，但代价惨重……Will Irons牺牲了，你也受了重伤。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_SF_BRIDGE_DESC: 阻止阿特拉斯对金门大桥的攻击。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_SF_BRIDGE_END_DESC: 在一次毁灭性的攻击中，阿特拉斯摧毁了金门大桥，对美国海军造成了沉重打击。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_SF_MOB_DESC: 抵达航母舰桥，使用Arclight电磁轨道炮摧毁阿特拉斯攻击艇。
schinese.MENU_SP_S1_SF_MOB_END_DESC: 你的小队已击退阿特拉斯攻击者，拯救了美国舰队的残余力量。
schinese.MENU_SP_STAT_TIME_FORMAT: 天    时      分      秒

schinese.MENU_TEAMS_TAKE_TURNS_CAPTURING: 双方轮流防守和占领目标。
schinese.MENU_TEAMS_TAKE_TURNS_DEFENDING: 双方轮流防守和摧毁目标。

schinese.MENU_WARNING_CHECKPOINT_RESET2: 如果继续，上一个任务的进度将被覆盖。

schinese.MPUI_COMP_MODE_DESCR:
启用更长的回合时间并解锁所有内容，适用于竞技比赛。
此模式下将无法访问呼号和兵营。
schinese.MPUI_CONF_RECIPE_DESC: 基于确认击杀模式的配方
schinese.MPUI_DEATHMATCH_RECIPE_DESC: 基于自由混战模式的配方
schinese.MPUI_DESC_BARRACKS: 挑战、荣誉、转生和排行榜。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_CHALLENGES: 完成挑战以获得经验值并解锁物品。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_COMBAT_TRAINING: 主持自定义比赛，可与好友和/或机器人一起游玩。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_COMBAT_TRAINING_LOCKED: 只有派对主持才能开始对抗训练比赛。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_FIND_GAME: 选择游戏模式并快速加入在线游戏。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_FIND_GAME_LOCKED: 只有派对主持才能寻找游戏。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_GAME_SETUP: 更改地图、游戏模式和规则。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_GAME_SETUP_LOCKED: 只有大厅主持才能更改游戏选项。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_LEADERBOARDS: 与好友和全球玩家比较数据。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_LEADERBOARD_ACCURACY: 查看您的射击准度表现。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_LEADERBOARD_KILLS: 查看总击杀、阵亡、KD比和最佳连杀。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_LEADERBOARD_WINS: 与好友和全球玩家比较胜败记录。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_LOCKED_WAITING_FOR_PARTY_MEMBE: 开始游戏前所有派对成员必须在场。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_BIGBEN2: 泰晤士河畔的军用货船，威斯敏斯特尽收眼底。船上节奏紧凑，码头远程对决。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_BLACKBOX: 拉什莫尔山脚下坠毁的航天器。在航天器危险的内部战斗，或利用有机环境侧翼包抄敌人。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_CLIMATE: 地球高空一个郁郁葱葱的气候控制舱。沿着开阔的外围弧线追踪对手，或潜入舱内的水下区域进行激烈枪战。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_CLOWNTOWN: 怀俄明州魔鬼塔阴影下的一家废弃汽车旅馆。在小丑旅馆的近战区域杀出一条血路，或利用采矿设施和自然地形进行远程交火。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_COMEBACK: 拉各斯市中心。占据高地掌控这张环形地图。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_DAM: 阿特拉斯水电站大坝，拥有多种开阔视距和近距离战斗区域。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_DETROIT: 底特律市中心。快速穿过开阔的主街道或在外部建筑中寻找安全。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_FRACTURE: 南极冰川架上的一处考古挖掘点。泛光灯、风力发电机和太阳能板将大型战斗区域分隔开来，为中远距离交火提供多种选择。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_GREENBAND: 韩国首尔的一座高层公园。整洁的通道和快速的侧翼路线带来出色的战术战斗体验。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_HIGHRISE2: 希腊卫城旁的高层办公楼的屋顶。布局开阔，节奏紧凑。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_INSTINCT: 南美洲阶梯金字塔中的采矿作业。开阔地形和争夺激烈的中心区域带来快节奏战斗。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_KREMLIN: 俄罗斯克里姆林宫是莫斯科中心的一座政府堡垒。中央的远程制高点为狙击手提供战术监视，也为哨戒机枪手提供激烈战斗。侧翼通道被雷区隔开，改变了游戏中的战斗节奏。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_LAB2: 位于纪念碑谷中心的阿特拉斯模块化生物工程设施。其快速的垂直空间增强了战术战斗。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_LAIR: 一场奢华的庆典，可欣赏新巴格达市区的壮丽景色。远程周边视线和装饰性等离子灯营造出战术性和电气化的氛围。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_LASER2: 围绕定向能防空武器的本土防空基地。中心区域有近距离贯穿通道，便于快速侧翼和高节奏战斗。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_LEVITY: 位于冰岛高地的阿特拉斯无人机设施。混乱的中心机库是激烈交火的场所。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_LIBERTY: 位于自由岛，在城市疫情爆发期间，灵长类动物测试设施为所有武器类型和玩家风格提供了完美的战斗融合。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_LOST: 戈壁沙漠中一座废弃的核聚变工厂废墟。在残骸中远程击杀敌人，或在中央涡轮机周围的隧道中进行近距离战斗。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_PERPLEX: 澳大利亚悉尼湾畔的豪华公寓大楼。在这张高度垂直的山丘之王风格地图上，向敌人倾泻混乱的炮火。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_PRISON: 一座发生暴动的监狱，有清晰的通道进行正面战斗。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_PRISON_Z: 一座发生暴动的监狱，有清晰的通道进行正面战斗。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_RECOVERY: 夏威夷火山口边缘的天文台。快节奏游戏，动态的咽喉要道。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_RECREATION: 休闲：通过某种消遣、适度的运动等恢复精神。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_REFRACTION: 墨西哥湾的太空电梯平台。上层甲板的远程视距与下层甲板的近距离战斗形成对比。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_SECTOR17: 阿特拉斯特种兵在科罗拉多州丹佛市的训练营练习高级外骨骼机动。训练场包含利用士兵外骨骼移动技能的快节奏行动。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_SEOUL2: 韩国首尔正在进行重建。大街上的远程视距和贯穿中部的紧凑室内区域，在这片城市丛林中带来快节奏战斗。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_SOLAR: 新巴格达附近的太阳能阵列。屋顶战斗，混合视距带来多样化的战斗体验。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_SPARK: 一个黑市外骨骼工业综合体。在这张中等大小的对称地图上参与快节奏枪战。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_TERRACE: 希腊圣托里尼的悬崖顶上。围绕封闭中心的动态通道带来出色的外骨骼体验。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_TORQUED: 落基山脉高处的田园诗般的滑雪胜地。争夺激烈的制高点和一个提供360度杀戮的旋转木马。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_URBAN: 达拉斯第三区，一座未来巨型建筑，将玩家引导至近距离自由混战。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_MAP_VENUS: 桂林山脉中的阿特拉斯避难所。充分利用外骨骼套装在这张地图中流畅穿梭。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_PRESTIGE_CUSTOM_CLASSES: 一个额外的自定义配置。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_PRESTIGE_DOUBLE_WEAPON_XP: 两小时的武器双倍经验。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_PRESTIGE_TITLE_EMBLEM_1: 为有多余转生币的玩家提供的呼号标题和徽章。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_PRESTIGE_TITLE_EMBLEM_2: 为COD爱好者提供的呼号标题和徽章。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_PRESTIGE_TITLE_EMBLEM_3: 为硬核COD玩家提供的呼号标题和徽章。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_PRESTIGE_UNLOCK_WEAPON: 提前解锁创建配置物品，并可在后续转生中保留。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_PRIVATE_JIP: 切换是否允许好友中途加入正在进行中的游戏。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_PRIVATE_MATCH: 主持自定义比赛，可与好友一起游玩。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_PRIVATE_MATCH_LOCKED: 只有派对主持才能开始私人比赛。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_PRIVATE_TOGGLE_RECORDING: 切换是否录制私人比赛以供剧场使用。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_REWARDS: 查看您在游戏外解锁的奖励。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_SELECT_OFFLINE_PROFILE: 选择离线档案来存储多人游戏进度。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_SELECT_SAVE_DEVICE: 选择存储设备保存多人游戏进度。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_USEONLINESTATS: 切换是否使用在线解锁和进度。
schinese.MPUI_DESC_ZOMBIE_ARK: 传染源感染了阿特拉斯的王牌超级航母！与最多4名玩家一起战斗，抵御无限波次的变异僵尸！
schinese.MPUI_DESC_ZOMBIE_BRG: 疫情蔓延到了美国乡村，大家最喜欢的汉堡店也被感染了！与最多4名玩家一起战斗，抵御无限波次的变异僵尸！
schinese.MPUI_DESC_ZOMBIE_H2O: 寻找Oz的行动在阿特拉斯水下城市达到了高潮。与最多4名玩家一起战斗，抵御无限波次的变异僵尸！
schinese.MPUI_DESC_ZOMBIE_LAB: 阿特拉斯的新宠物从实验室逃出，感染了整个营地。与最多4名玩家一起战斗，抵御无限波次的变异僵尸！
schinese.MPUI_DLC_GO_TO_STORE: 您可以前往商店购买游戏内容和Elite高级会员资格。

schinese.PERKS_DESC_BLINDEYE: 对追踪无人机、爆炸无人机及除 UAV 外的所有连杀奖励不可见。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_CAREPACKAGE: 重生时获得一个补给箱。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_CHALLENGES: 完成挑战以获得经验并解锁多种物品。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_COLDBLOODED: 免疫热成像、目标增强器、威胁手雷和敌方呼叫。被瞄准时无名称或准星颜色变化。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_CONCUSSIONGRENADE: 使目标迷失方向和减速。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_CONCUSSION_GRENADE: 临时使敌人迷失方向和减速。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_CREATE_A_CLASS: 创建并自定义你的角色配置。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_CREATE_A_STREAK_REWARDS: 创建并自定义你的突击和支援连杀奖励包。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_DANGERCLOSE: 造成更多爆炸和连杀奖励伤害。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_DUALMAG: 每隔一次换弹速度更快。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EMP_GRENADE: 禁用敌方装备和外骨骼移动。可手动引爆。

显示敌方装备，延时爆炸物，重滚补给箱，诱捕敌方补给箱。

子弹和爆炸伤害标记目标。

schinese.PERKS_DESC_EOTECH: 瞄准时自动变焦且不动。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_BATTERY: 增加外骨骼能力电池续航。猛击落地使附近敌人震荡。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_BLASTSUPPRESSOR: 执行外骨骼移动时在小地图上隐形。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_CLOAK: 短时间内视觉隐藏自己。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_DODGE: 执行闪避移动的外骨骼能力。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_KNIFE: 可回收的致命投掷无人机。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_PING: 在 HUD 上显示敌方外骨骼移动和武器开火。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_REPULSOR: 摧毁最多两枚来袭敌方射弹。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_SHIELD: 快速部署手臂上的便携盾牌。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_SHOULDERLAUNCHER: 无需放下武器即可发射外骨骼发射器。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_SLAMBOOTS: 在敌人附近猛击时使其震荡。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXO_SLIDE: 执行强力滑铲的外骨骼能力。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXPLOSIVE_DRONE: 追踪敌人并在接近时爆炸的感应无人机。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_EXTRA_HEALTH: 临时生成超过正常水平的生命值。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_FASTHANDS: 冲刺时换弹。更快切换武器、使用外骨骼能力和外骨骼发射器。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_FASTMANTLE: 更快翻越和攀爬——攀爬尚未实现。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_FINESSE:
延长屏气时间。所有武器均可屏气。
Lvl 1: 10 秒
Lvl 2: 15 秒
schinese.PERKS_DESC_FLAKJACKET: 减少爆炸伤害。可用武器切换取消手雷引信。扔回手雷时重置引信。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_HARDLINE: 降低连杀奖励需求 100 分。

schinese.PERKS_DESC_HOARDER: 补充发射器弹药和战术电池。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_LETHAL_VARIABLE: 可循环切换闪光、EMP、威胁和烟雾。不可手动引爆。
schinese.PERKS_DESC_LOWPROFILE: 对 UAV、追踪弹和外骨骼脉冲不可见。

schinese.PLATFORM_CACHED_SPOT_SHADOWS_DESCRIPTION:
预计算的聚光灯阴影渲染，需要大量额外显存。

警告：非常消耗显存。仅推荐至少4GB显存的显卡使用。若出现纹理流导致模糊纹理，请禁用此项。
schinese.PLATFORM_CACHED_SUN_SHADOWS_DESCRIPTION:
预计算的阳光阴影渲染，需要额外显存。

警告：非常消耗显存。仅推荐至少4GB显存的显卡使用。若出现纹理流导致模糊纹理，请禁用此项。
schinese.PLATFORM_CODPOINT_INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS_MES: 补给积分不足。你可以回收物品获得额外补给积分。

schinese.PLATFORM_DYK_IW5_MSG2: 通过连续击杀不死获得突击和专家连杀奖励。

schinese.PLATFORM_FILL_MEMORY_TEXTURES_DESCRIPTIO:
用纹理填充剩余显存。

schinese.PLATFORM_POST_AA_DESCRIPTION: 减少锯齿的后期处理效果。SMAA T2x 和 Filmic SMAA T2x 不推荐用于 NVIDIA SLI 或 AMD Crossfire 系统，因为会显著降低性能。

schinese.PLATFORM_UI_DOUBLE_TAP_DODGE_DESC: 双击移动方向激活外骨骼冲刺/外骨骼闪避
schinese.PLATFORM_UI_SEASONPASS_MOTD:
《使命召唤：高级战争》季票让你以超值价格获得四个激动人心的 DLC 包，每个都包含一系列创新的多人游戏新内容。

拥有季票，你即可立即进入阿特拉斯峡谷多人地图，这是粉丝最爱的《使命召唤4：现代战争》地图管道（Pipeline）的重制版。

借助高级战争外骨骼技术探索地图的新垂直空间，并掌控毁灭性的地图炮塔连杀奖励。

现已上市。

访问游戏内商店了解更多。

schinese.SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_AT11_IVESPOTTEDTHE: ^2阿特拉斯警卫1: ^7我发现他们了——就在那里！
schinese.SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_AT11_PROPHETTHEFIR: ^2阿特拉斯警卫1: ^7先知，地下室的防火门关了！我们拦不住那些逃犯！赶紧把门打开，妈的！
schinese.SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_AT2_ATLASONEWEVEGO: ^2Atlas Guard 2: ^7Atlas一号，我们在老城区堵住了逃跑者！

schinese.SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_ECHOTEAMTOOKDO: ^2Gideon: ^7回声小队昨天又端掉了一个KVA据点。整个网络正在瓦解。Hades是关键。
schinese.SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_HARDTOBELIEVET: ^2Gideon: ^7真难相信这是巴格达。两年前你一出门就可能被枪杀。现在这他妈的欣欣向荣，多亏了我们。
schinese.SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_HOWDOESITFEELT: ^2Gideon: ^7成为世界英雄的感觉如何？别让它冲昏了你的--

schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_TWOONTOP: ^2Cormack: ^7Ilona，你负责右下。我负责左边。Mitchell，你负责上面那两个。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_WATCHWINDS: ^2Cormack: ^7注意风力，用磁力吸附稳住自己。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_WEARENOW: ^2Cormack: ^7继续走。他们现在知道我们在哪了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_YOURASS: ^2Cormack: ^7不行，Guardian 5！待在地上别动。我们来装货。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GDN_ANDWEALLWOULDBE: ^2Gideon: ^7而我们都会被蒙在鼓里。只是有太多疑问了。我需要为自己找些答案。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GDN_IRONSHASBETRAYED: ^2Gideon: ^7Irons背叛了我所代表的一切。我和你一样想让他下地狱。如果你想阻止他，我们得拿到那个货物。现在。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GDN_IRONSISPLANNINGA: ^2Gideon: ^7Irons正在计划对美国的先发制人打击。他一直在秘密开发大规模杀伤性武器。一种生物武器。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_DEALTHWITH: ^2吉迪恩: ^7阿特拉斯2-1，我已准备好撤离。哨兵特勤人员已解决。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_HOLDFIRE2: ^2Gideon: ^7锁定目标，但等我信号再开火。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_IMMEDIATEEXFIL: ^2吉迪恩: ^7这里是阿特拉斯一号，需要在我坐标位置立即撤离。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_STAYLOW: ^2吉迪恩: ^7所有人跟上我。伊洛娜保持低姿态，呼叫撤离。准备好应对突发情况。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GRDN5_LOSTREAD: ^2守护者5: ^7主心骨，这里是守护者5！我们失去了尾部稳定器！
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GRDN5_STATIC4: ^2守护者5: ^7致任何能收到此通讯的哨兵部队。这里是守护者5。我们有2人受伤，1人死亡。需要立即撤离。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GRDN5_WHERETHEHELL: ^2守护者5: ^7哨兵2-3，你们他妈在哪？我们正在遭受攻击！多人阵亡。请求立即战区撤离！指挥部未回应！
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_ANDWERESUPPOSEDT: ^2伊洛娜: ^7我们凭什么要跟你走？
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_BLEWHATCH: ^2伊洛娜: ^7哨兵2炸开了后舱门，正在保护货物。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_CLEARING: ^2伊洛娜: ^7哨兵4正在清理驾驶舱。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_FOLLOWWATER: ^2伊洛娜: ^7我们可以试着跟着水流穿过这里。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_FROMSURFACE: ^2伊洛娜: ^7那声音来自地面。肯定是更多的空投舱。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_GROUPLEAVING: ^2伊洛娜: ^7右边的小队正在撤离。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_GROUPLEFTLEAVING: ^2伊洛娜: ^7左边的小队正在撤离。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_GRUNT1: ^2伊洛娜: ^7[从冰滑道上摔下来，痛苦闷哼]
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_GRUNT2: ^2伊洛娜: ^7[从冰滑道上摔下来，痛苦闷哼]
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_GRUNT3: ^2伊洛娜: ^7[落地，剧烈痛苦闷哼，喘不上气]
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_NOISE: ^2科马克: ^7前面有动静。这边，慢慢走。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_PUNCTUAL: ^2伊洛娜: ^7他们还挺准时的，这点得承认。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_SECURECARGO2: ^2Ilona: ^7我们得确保货物安全！继续前进！
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_SECURINGCARGO: ^2伊洛娜: ^7撤离小组炸开了后舱门，正在保护货物。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_STAYUPHERE: ^2伊洛娜: ^7我待在上面提供掩护火力。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_SWIMDOWN: ^2伊洛娜: ^7米切尔，跟科马克一起潜下去。我就在你们后面。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_THERMALS: ^2Ilona: ^7热成像在这水里根本没法用。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_VTOLTAKEOFF: ^2Ilona: ^7垂直起降机要起飞了！快冲！快冲！
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_WHYNOWGIDEON: ^2Ilona: ^7为什么是现在，吉迪恩？你本可以跟我们一块逃出新巴格达的。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_KP_ISSTILLON: ^2Kingpin: ^7增援已到，哨兵2-3。任务继续——你们必须取回货物。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_KP_ORBITAL: ^2Kingpin: ^7我们正追踪他们的轨道平台。暂无动静。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_KP_PODSINBOUND: ^2Kingpin: ^7各单位注意，探测到阿特拉斯快速反应部队正在接近，空降舱即将抵达你们的位置。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_KP_SENDINGEXFIL: ^2Kingpin: ^7收到，正在向你们位置派遣撤离部队。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SO_PRIMEOBJ: ^2Kingpin: ^7全部收到，哨兵2-3。你们的主要目标是货物。其他资产均可舍弃。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SS1_MANDOWN: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7有人阵亡，有人阵亡。我们撑不到守护者5号了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SS1_MNORTHRIDGE: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7北部山脊又有空降舱降落！
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SS1_SECURECARGO: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7哨兵2号正在前往保护货物。
schinese.SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SS1_SOUTHRIDGE: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7南部山脊又有空降舱降落！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_IFYOUHAVEAQ: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7有问题就问戴红色徽章的人。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_IKNOWYOUALL: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7我知道大家对清理工作有很多疑问。我会尽量告诉你们所有信息。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_ONCEYOURDNA: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7一旦你的DNA录入系统，就会分配工作。当然有一定灵活性，我们希望你们在这里过得愉快，但我们需要人岗匹配。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_REMEMBERNOT: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7记住，没有DNA芯片什么都做不了。小孩大人一样，没有例外，没有借口…每个人都需要DNA芯片。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_SECTORSATHR: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7A区到F区明天开始安排清洁任务。我相信很多人听到这个消息会很高兴。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_WEAPPRECIAT: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7感谢你们的耐心。只是想给大家一个最新情况。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_WERELOOKING: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7我们计划下个月开始滚动排班。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_WEREREOPENI: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7我们周一重新开放C区食堂。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_YOULLBEWONT: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7在录入DNA芯片之前，你领不到任何配给。DNA芯片——我知道听起来很疼，但这只是个小程序，能让我们更好地帮助你们。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_ANEMPTYCITY: ^2Gideon: ^7一座没有警察也没有目击者的空城。藏东西或藏人的好地方。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_BEENGOINGTW: ^2Gideon: ^7连续二十二天。KVA不休息，我们也不休息。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_CLEANUPCREW: ^2Gideon: ^7前面有清扫车。这个区不应该有人。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_COPYPROPHET: ^2Gideon: ^7收到，先知。五分钟后到达蓝色检查点。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_GOOD: ^2Gideon: ^7好。我们得离开当前位置。出发。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_HEWILLBE: ^2Gideon: ^7他会搞定的。我会确保这一点。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_IFTHEKVAHAV: ^2Gideon: ^7如果KVA一直在伪装行动，那他们可能比我们想象的要多。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_JOKERIVEGOT: ^2Gideon: ^7小丑，发现尸体。看起来是清洁队。防化服不见了。所有穿防化服的都视为敌人。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_JOKERPARKER: ^2Gideon: ^7米切尔和我走北边，你们俩走南边。贝茨街集合。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_KEEPITONAUT: ^2Gideon: ^7同步到我这边，保持自动驾驶。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_MITCHELLIMS: ^2Gideon: ^7米切尔，我看到很多动静。藏好了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_MITCHELLMIT: ^2Gideon: ^7见鬼。如果能行，往南边推进。在那汇合。
^2Gideon: ^7米切尔？米切尔？坚持住，我试着下去找你。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_NEEDTOACCEL: ^2Gideon: ^7得加快进度了。准备干掉他们。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_PROPHETBRAV: ^2Gideon: ^7先知，Bravo二一。正在通过德尔塔阶段性界线。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_PROPHETWERE: ^2Gideon: ^7先知，我们在蓝色检查点，正穿过学校。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_SEENYOURPAL: ^2Gideon: ^7最近见过你的朋友哈迪斯吗？
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_THATSWHATTH: ^2Gideon: ^7他们全都这么说。就在惨叫开始之前。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_THEYREPROTE: ^2Gideon: ^7他们在保护我们的目标。还锁定着他吗？
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_DCR_YOUTHINKTHI: ^2Doctor: ^7你觉得这能改变什么？你根本不知道他有多厉害。你们都死定了！我们都死定了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_JKR_BIOMETRICTR: ^2Joker: ^7生物特征追踪已锁定他。还在医院。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_JKR_MIDTOWNHOSP: ^2Joker: ^7皮埃尔·达诺瓦医生。他在市中心医院。可以行动。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_JKR_THEYWEREGOI: ^2Joker: ^7他们本打算下个月开始让居民返回。然后KVA出现了，现在全城封锁。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_JKR_WEREATTHECH: ^2Joker: ^7我们在贝茨街的检查点。到处都是KVA。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_KVA_BAUERDOYOUR: ^2KVA: ^7鲍尔，能听到吗？无线电检查，无线电检查。鲍尔！正在向你移动。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_ATTENTIONCUR: ^2Pa: ^7注意：宵禁在一小时后开始。重复，宵禁在一小时后开始。谢谢。
^2PA: ^7注意：宵禁在一小时后开始。重复，宵禁在一小时后开始。谢谢。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_CURFEWISNOWI: ^2Pa: ^7宵禁现已生效，范围A区至D区。请返回你们的住所。谢谢。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_NONCOMPLIANC: ^2Pa: ^7违反安全协议合同将立即被起诉。如有疑问，请咨询你的安全协调员。
^2PA: ^7违反安全协议合同将立即被起诉。如有疑问，请咨询你的安全协调员。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_REMEMBERTOHA: ^2Pa: ^7请始终随身携带你的身份徽章。
^2PA: ^7请始终随身携带你的身份徽章。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_REPORTANYSUS: ^2Pa: ^7请向你的安全协调员报告任何可疑活动。
^2PA: ^7请向你的安全协调员报告任何可疑活动。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_THISISSAFETY: ^2Pa: ^7这里是安全提醒。请将所有物品放在你的住所内。无人看管的物品将被没收。谢谢。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PRT_BRAVOTWOONE: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo二一，达诺瓦医生在医院守着。时间紧迫。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PRT_COPYTHATBRA: ^2Prophet: ^7收到，Bravo二一。欢迎派对已准备好。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PRT_ISRDETECTIN: ^2Prophet: ^7情报监视侦察发现西北方向一百米处有动静。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PRT_THEDOCTORSN: ^2Prophet: ^7记住，只能活捉。我们需要他找到哈迪斯。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_TRS_ROGERGOODTO: ^2Torres: ^7准备就绪。摩托车准备好了，时间表已锁定。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_BRK_PROPHETTARGETIS: ^2Gideon: ^7先知，目标已控制。带回去审讯。吉迪恩完毕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_GDN_ILIKETOKNOWWHOS: ^2Gideon: ^7我喜欢知道谁在掩护我，伙计。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_GDN_LETSGETITDONE: ^2Gideon: ^7追捕哈迪斯四年，他的左右手居然自己送上门来了。真他妈绝了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_GDN_NOFUCKINHOLIDAY: ^2Gideon: ^7没有他妈的假期，但他们有食物、水、安保。全是阿特拉斯提供的。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_GDN_NOWTHEKVAHAVETH: ^2Gideon: ^7现在KVA居然有胆子搬到隔壁来了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_GDN_TWOANDAHALFMILL: ^2Gideon: ^7两百五十万人就生活在这样的营地里。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_JKR_YOUSUREWEREOKAY: ^2Joker: ^7你确定我们这样做没问题吗，老大？
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_KNX_REACTIONARYFORC: ^2???: ^7反应部队在路上，我们掩护你。现在带上医生趁能走赶紧撤。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_MCH_GOTFOUROPERATIV: ^2AST: ^7有四名骑摩托的特工正在进入。任务命令5527。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_CP1_HOSTILE: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7敌人登上了垂直起降机！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_DAV_MORESQUADS: ^2Davis: ^7全部收到。再派两个小队过去！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_DAV_ONTHERUN: ^2Davis: ^7我们把他们打跑了！战术行动中心就在眼前！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_DAV_TORNAPART: ^2Davis: ^72-1，我们下面伤亡惨重。需要干掉那些炮塔！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GDN_GRABSTINGERS: ^2Gideon: ^7米切尔，你跟诺克斯一起。我们掩护，你们拿毒刺导弹。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GDN_IRONSENGINEERED: ^2Gideon: ^7艾恩斯设计让这东西对他自己的部队无害。我们三个肯定被接种过抗体了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GDN_KNOXISDOWN: ^2Gideon: ^7诺克斯倒了！我需要立即医疗撤离！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GDN_TANKSOVERRUN: ^2Gideon: ^7米切尔，在坦克冲过来之前拿上毒刺导弹。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GDN_TEARUSAPART: ^2Gideon: ^7找掩护，那些坦克会在开阔地把我们撕碎的！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_ADVANCINGON: ^2Gideon: ^7戴维斯，我们正在向目标建筑推进。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_BREAKLINE: ^2Gideon: ^7指挥部，这里是哨兵2-1实际指挥员。我们正在改道协助第95师突破敌人战线。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_BUSTERNEWBAGHDA: ^2Gideon: ^7我们会全速赶往新巴格达，在艾恩斯反应过来之前抓住他。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_CATCHBASTARDS: ^2Gideon: ^7用加力燃烧室追上那些混蛋！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_CLEAROUTASTS: ^2Gideon: ^7清除那些AST。我们必须穿过防线找到艾恩斯！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_CLOSINGIN: ^2Gideon: ^7敌机正从六点钟方向逼近，米切尔。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_DAMDOWN: ^2Gideon: ^7指挥部，大坝被摧毁了。改变航向前往新巴格达。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_DEPLOYMENTSUCCE: ^2Gideon: ^7吊舱部署成功。距离目标1200米。最小化系统功率。切换至低探测模式。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_ELIMINATETURRET: ^2Gideon: ^7戴维斯，我们已在目标建筑就位。正在前往摧毁炮塔。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_ENGAGEANYTHING: ^2Gideon: ^7攻击任何没有哨兵信标的目标。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_FINALAPPROACH: ^2Gideon: ^7指挥部，这里是哨兵01，即将抵达新巴格达。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_GETONPOINT: ^2Knox: ^7米切尔，上前。这些炮塔必须马上干掉！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_GOHIGH1: ^2Gideon: ^7全部收到。我们从高处走，看能不能绕到敌人后面。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_HARDPOINTS: ^2Gideon: ^7锁定那些硬挂点，用导弹打他们。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_KEEPPUSHING2: ^2Gideon: ^7继续向前推进，我们必须摧毁那些炮塔！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_MAINTARGET: ^2Gideon: ^7我们的主要目标是阿特拉斯指挥中心，艾恩斯正在深处指挥作战。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_MOVEMOVE3: ^2Gideon: ^7走，走，那些炮塔必须现在干掉！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_NEUTRALIZETURRE: ^2Gideon: ^7金平，炮塔已清除。空中支援可以进入了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_NOUGHT: ^2Gideon: ^7金平，哨兵2-1正在接近APC，呼号罗密欧维克多零，高度5000英尺。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_SORTBASTARDS: ^2Gideon: ^7好，先收拾这些混蛋，然后去找艾恩斯。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_TRAJECTORY: ^2Gideon: ^7城市周围部署了多个MD防空炮塔。我们必须摧毁它们才能到达指挥中心。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_USEBLOWER: ^2Gideon: ^7保持在它下方飞行，或者用加力燃烧室冲过去。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_WILDRIDE: ^2Gideon: ^7一路颠簸。跟戴维斯中士汇合。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_HOLT_THERMALS: ^2Knox: ^7所有呼号，他们在用烟雾覆盖区域，切换热成像继续推进。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_CAUTION: ^2Ilona: ^7明白，谨慎前进，中士。我们会提供空中支援。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_CONTAMINANT: ^2Ilona: ^7指挥部，我们被某种空气污染物击中了。建议所有部队后撤，重复后—
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_DAMNSECTOR: ^2Ilona: ^7我们正在推进，但那些MD炮塔在摧毁我们的空中支援。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_GRABTHATSTINGER: ^2Ilona: ^7米切尔，我掩护你，拿毒刺导弹！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_THEMAINASSAULT: ^2Ilona: ^7主攻方向正在转向阿特拉斯总部！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRN_TYRANTNATION: ^2Irons: ^7新巴格达的市民们。坚持住，胜利就在我们手中。看看周围，你们会看到敌人一个个倒下。你们每一个人都能成为变革的推动者。是的，我们会遭受损失，会遭遇挫折，但毫无疑问，我们会赢，这是你们与生俱来的权利。你们渴望的安全，你们应得的安全，就在我们手中。但只有你们愿意为之战斗，才能得到它。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_BUTITCANONLY: ^2Irons: ^7但只有你们愿意为之战斗，才能得到它。为之战斗吧。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_CITIZENSOFBAGHD: ^2Irons: ^7新巴格达的市民们，坚持住。胜利就在我们手中。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_EACHANDEVERY: ^2Irons: ^7你们每一个人都能成为变革的推动者。是的，我们会遭受损失。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_LOOKAROUNDYOU: ^2Irons: ^7看看周围，你们会看到敌人一个个倒下。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_THESECURITY: ^2Irons: ^7你们渴望的安全，你们应得的安全，就在我们手中。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_WEWILLSUFFER: ^2Irons: ^7我们会遭遇挫折。但毫无疑问，我们会赢。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_CANCELDROP8: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7阿波罗2号，重复上一条——确认还是取消下一次投放？
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_CANCELINGRUN8: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7全部收到，阿波罗。取消任务。请注意，战机已挂弹待命，可供调遣。提供新目标，让我们为你们清路。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_COMMENCING8: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7阿波罗2号，我们即将对目标位置Helo-59进行扫射。收到否？
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_ORDINANCE7: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7好了，坐标3-4-3-2-6-1。给你们送点弹药过去，伙计们。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_PROCEED7: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7收到。继续执行目标，阿波罗。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_KNX_GETONTHAT: ^2Knox: ^7米切尔！上那个炮塔！我们快到了，干掉那个狗娘养的！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_KNX_GODDAMN: ^2Knox: ^7妈的…他做到了…他他妈的真做到了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_KNX_MANTICORE: ^2Knox: ^7不…是曼提柯尔。我们必须撤退，把所有人都撤出去！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_KP_ENEMYSNIPERS: ^2Kingpin: ^7干得好2-1。我们正在重新调配空中力量到你们位置。向指挥中心推进。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_KP_LOWLEVEL10: ^2Kingpin: ^7从那里到新巴格达保持低空飞行。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_MAG_SAVEDTAIL: ^2Magik: ^7谢谢掩护火力。你救了我的尾巴。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_2BIRDS: ^2Knox: ^7两架敌机从十二点钟方向接近。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_3BIRDS: ^2Knox: ^7三架敌机从十二点钟方向接近。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_4BANDITS: ^2Knox: ^7十二点钟方向，四架敌机在挑衅。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_4BIRDS: ^2Knox: ^7四架敌机从十二点钟方向接近。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_ADJACENTBUILDIN: ^2Knox: ^7我看到了，就在隔壁建筑的上层！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_BACKAROUND: ^2Knox: ^7他们绕回来了！六点钟方向高处！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_CONNECTING: ^2Knox: ^7正在将抬头显示器连接到战场网络。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_ENEMYBIRDS: ^2Knox: ^7更多敌方战机从十二点钟方向出现。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_LETSHITIT: ^2Knox: ^7还有一座炮塔在运作，西南侧。端掉它！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_MULTASTS: ^2Knox: ^7有多台AST加入阿特拉斯地面部队。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_OVERRIDGE: ^2Knox: ^7更多敌机从两点钟方向越过山脊！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_PLAYINGCHICKEN: ^2Knox: ^7四架敌方战机在十二点钟方向跟我们玩对头。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_SOUTHWESTCORNER: ^2Knox: ^7我看到了，目标建筑西南角，二楼。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_THISWAY4: ^2Knox: ^7米切尔，你去哪？目标建筑在这边！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_WEAPONCACHE: ^2Knox: ^7吉迪恩，给我火力掩护，前面有武器箱！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SO_OFFRADAR: ^2Kingpin: ^7全部收到，01。你们小队已从雷达上消失。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SO_SEND24: ^2Kingpin: ^7阿尔忒弥斯4号，这里是奥林匹斯。请讲。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SO_UNABLE2: ^2Kingpin: ^7请注意，2-1，艾瑞斯无法在你们责任区提供侦察支援。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_AAAAAAH1: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7啊啊啊啊啊！<被从四楼阳台扔下去>
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_AAAAAAH2: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7啊啊啊啊啊！<被从四楼阳台扔下去>
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_CHOKING1: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7被掐住喉咙时的咳嗽/窒息声
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_ENGAGING6: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7收到。正在攻击敌方目标。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_FLANKPOSITION11: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7确认，阿波罗6号。我们正在向侧翼位置跃进。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_FORTIFIED12: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7明白。敌人已加固阵地并将我们压制。请求立即支援。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_LANDMARK1: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7阿瑞斯2号，请求地图网格上的视觉地标。收到否？
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_LOSINGTARGET: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7我正在失去目标锁定。这他妈的怎么回事？
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_MAINTAINPOS4: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7阿瑞斯Zero Actual呼叫所有阿瑞斯单位——保持防御阵位。间距保持在10米。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_MOVEMENT6: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7是的，明白。西边约一公里处、阿尔萨迪金融公司南边有些动静。看起来大约有四五个持轻武器的敌人。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_NEEDMEDIC: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7这里是4-2 *咳嗽* *咳嗽* 我们需要医护兵…烟雾中有某种毒气。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_NEEDSUPPORT: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7我们需要街道层面的支援。我们被AST单位打得稀烂！他们从四面八方冲过来了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_PAYLOADINBOUND: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7收到，阿瑞斯2号，我们锁定你了。目标已确认。弹药即将到达。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_POSITION1: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7明白，阿瑞斯，收到。炮兵正在进入阵位。待命。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_SEND23: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7雅典娜4号，这里是波塞冬3号。请讲，完毕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_THISIS12: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7阿瑞斯3号，这里是复仇女神1号。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_THOSEMECHS: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7妈的！找人去搞定那些炮塔。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_TOOMUCHFIRE: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7正在从右侧推进！目标建筑火力太猛了——
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_WOUNDED12: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^72人受伤，1人阵亡。弹药充足。敌人20多名步兵。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_AAAAAAH1: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7啊啊啊啊啊！<被从四楼阳台扔下去>
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_AAAAAAH2: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7啊啊啊啊啊！<被从四楼阳台扔下去>
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_ARTSUPPORT1: ^2Sentinel Soldier #2: ^7波塞冬1号，这里是阿瑞斯2号。请求对地图坐标3-1-3-4-6-3进行炮火支援。收到否？
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_CHOKING1: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7被掐住喉咙时的咳嗽/窒息声
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_FINBUILDING1: ^2Sentinel Soldier #2: ^7收到，波塞冬。目标在阿尔萨迪金融大楼西侧。多台AST和呃…3辆以上重型装甲。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_PINNEDDOWN: ^2Sentinel Soldier #2: ^7被压制了。清理那些炮塔！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_TAKINGDAMAGE: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7我正在受损。什么，哦天哪不！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_AAAAAAH1: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7啊啊啊啊啊！<被从四楼阳台扔下去>
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_AAAAAAH2: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7啊啊啊啊啊！<被从四楼阳台扔下去>
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_CANCELRUN8: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7威士忌-探戈-狐步舞——取消你们的任务！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_CEASEDROPS8: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7否定，否定。我们处于危险中——停止额外投放。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_CHOKING1: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7被掐住喉咙时的咳嗽/窒息声
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_HOLD13: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7复仇女神1号，保持位置并提供火力基阵。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_IMMSTRIKE7: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7赫尔墨斯，这里是阿波罗2号请求立即打击目标。收到否。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_MAPGRID7: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7地图坐标3-4-3-2-6-1。阿卜杜勒-拉赫曼大楼西侧。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_MULTCONTACTS: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7奥林匹斯，阿尔忒弥斯2-1。我们在大型玻璃建筑附近有多处敌军接触，地图坐标2-2-1-3-2-4。请求批准开火。收到否，完毕？
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_POSITIONALDATA3: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7雅典娜，这里是复仇女神Actual。我们在当前位置有位置数据。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_SITREP12: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7明白，保持位置并报告情况。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_STRUCTCOMP: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7结构受损。发生什么了，不——！
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_CONFIRMATION6: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7明白。保持对敌人的目视。正在确认批准攻击目标。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_END23: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7雅典娜4号，情况报告完毕。完毕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_HOWCOPY23: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7雅典娜4号，意图占领目标Bravo。收到否，完毕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_NOTINBOUND11: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7我们正在撤回防御阵位。空中支援没有到来。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_OUT11: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7明白，雅典娜5号。阿波罗6号完毕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_SITREPD23: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7波塞冬3号，这里是雅典娜4号。请等待情况报告，完毕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_SUPPORT24: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7奥林匹斯，阿尔忒弥斯4号请求在我位置提供快速反应部队支援。敌军正在从北面攻击。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_THISAPOLLO6: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7雅典娜6号，这里是阿波罗4号。
schinese.SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_THISIS24: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7奥林匹斯，这里是阿尔忒弥斯4号。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_BTR_DOMINO34COMEIN: ^2Battle Commander: ^7多米诺3-4，回话。收到吗？重复，收到吗？
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_BTR_PULLBACKANDHOLDP: ^2Battle Commander: ^7后撤并守住位置，多米诺。你们责任区内没有可用支援。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_DMN_ANYSTATIONANYSTA: ^2Domino: ^7任何电台，任何电台，这里是多米诺3-4，我们正遭到猛烈火力！需要立即支援！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_DMN_THEYREEVERYWHERE: ^2Domino: ^7到处都是！还击，还击——*静电干扰*
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_COPYTHATKINGPIN: ^2Gideon: ^7收到，金平。发射已被中止。重复，发射已被中止。收到吗？金平，回话！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_DAMNWERECUTOFF: ^2Gideon: ^7该死，我们被切断了！我们必须转移。他们随时会轰炸这栋建筑。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_HESHACKINGOUREXO: ^2Gideon: ^7他在黑我们的外骨骼！我没弹药了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_ILONATHEMISSILES: ^2Gideon: ^7伊洛娜，导弹有护盾！我们需要另一个入口！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_IMSETTINGYOUDOWN: ^2Gideon: ^7我把你放下来。你得试着走路，米切尔。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_ISEEEM: ^2Gideon: ^7我看到他们了。米切尔，自由开火！干他们！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_IVEGOTYAMATE: ^2Gideon: ^7我抓住你了，伙计。我抓住你了。他的结局只有这一种。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_MITCHELL5: ^2Gideon: ^7米切尔！试着按外骨骼的释放按钮！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_NECESSARY: ^2Gideon: ^7必要？对美国发动攻击？释放曼提柯尔，杀死成千上万无辜的人！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_THERESNOTIME: ^2Gideon: ^7没时间了！如果他跑了，这一切就白费了！走，现在！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_WESTOPPEDITWESTO: ^2Gideon: ^7我们阻止了它，我们阻止了发射！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_WHATABOUTDRONESU: ^2Gideon: ^7金平，我们在水下。正在接近破入点。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_GDN_YEAH: ^2Gideon: ^7是啊…历史上那些扭曲的混蛋都用过同样的论调。他们不知道我们已经阻止了发射；他们会把这整栋楼都炸塌在你头上。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_ILN1_GIDEONIMLOSINGT: ^2Ilona: ^7吉迪恩，我快追丢你的位置了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_ILN1_GIDEONTHERMALRE: ^2Ilona: ^7吉迪恩，指挥中心的热读数是飙升。他们很快就要发射了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_ILN1_HEADDOWN: ^2Ilona: ^7低头。你得用底层的排气管道。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_ILN1_THERESANACCESSP: ^2Ilona: ^7前面有个通往排气管道的入口。我把位置发给你。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_ANDINTHEMEANTIME: ^2Irons: ^7与此同时，威尔在等待。年复一年地腐烂，而我却无能为力。直到现在。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_ICOULDHAVEKILLED: ^2Irons: ^7我本可以在战俘营杀了你。我现在也可以杀了你。但我不会。我不是怪物。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_IMSAVINGTHEWORLD: ^2Irons: ^7我在拯救这个世界！当没有人再挑战阿特拉斯时，就不会再有战争了。一路上必须有牺牲。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_ITDIDNTFAILIFAIL: ^2Irons: ^7不是它失败了。是我失败了！我没能把它做对！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_MITCHELLPULLMEUP: ^2Irons: ^7米切尔，拉我上去。我不会松手的，所以你一定要拉我上去！米切尔。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_MITCHELLWHATAREY: ^2Irons: ^7米切尔！你在干什么！？你在干什么，米切尔，那只手臂是我给你的。米切尔！我给了你第二次机会。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_NO: ^2Irons: ^7不。五年前埋的只是一口棺材。威尔还活着。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_NOBRAINFUNCTIONB: ^2Irons: ^7没有大脑功能，但我们有技术可以让他保存着，以防万一。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_REPLACEMENTORGAN: ^2Irons: ^7替代器官，从士兵的DNA中映射而来。加速组织再生。器官在几周内生长，而不是几年。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_SOINSTEADOFCREAT: ^2Irons: ^7所以我创造的是一种武器，而不是解药。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_SOYOUWANTTOKILL: ^2Irons: ^7所以你想杀了我？杀了我？！好。来啊！那就动手吧。我在等你。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_THERESONLYTWOCHO: ^2Irons: ^7只有两个选择。你要么拉我上去，要么整栋楼塌了我们一起陪葬！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_THESUPREMECOURT: ^2Irons: ^7最高法院。总是担心扮演上帝，却从不担心装傻。所以我不得不采取激进的措施——非法的措施——而我不在乎。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_UNDERSTANDMANTIC: ^2Irons: ^7听好了，曼提柯尔最初是一个基因生长项目，而不是基因武器。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_WELLNOTEXACTLYAL: ^2Irons: ^7嗯，不完全是活着，更像是…“不死生物”，真的。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_WHATIVESTARTEDWO: ^2Irons: ^7我所开创的事业不会随我而终结。它比我更宏大。当然也比你宏大。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_WILLCOULDNTBESAV: ^2Irons: ^7威尔无法用当时的技术救活。但是…他需要基因工程器官——我们本可以给他的。但美国以道德为由关停了我们的项目。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_IRS_YOUTHINKIMAMONST: ^2Irons: ^7你觉得我是怪物？那只是因为你没有做必要之事的决心。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_KGN_GOODJOBTWOONE: ^2Kingpin: ^7干得好，二一。坚持住，我们来了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_KGN_IFYOUDONTTHINKYO: ^2Kingpin: ^7如果你觉得阻止不了，就赶紧离开那里。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_KGN_NEGATIVETWOONEAL: ^2Kingpin: ^7二一，请注意。如果你们无法阻止发射，我们将被迫打击指挥中心。我们会冒曼提柯尔进一步扩散的风险，但这将是我们唯一的选择。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_KGN_SENTINELTWOONECI: ^2Kingpin: ^7哨兵二一，城市防御正在崩溃。阿特拉斯部队正在瓦解。我们需要知道发射状态。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_KGN_SENTINELTWOONEWE: ^2Kingpin: ^7哨兵二一，我们仍在城市中检测到高浓度污染。我们将无法派遣地面部队协助你们，完毕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_MCHL_ITWASAPLANONLYG: ^2Mitchell: ^7这个计划只有吉迪恩想得出来——用我们在基地找到的两套机甲正面突袭艾恩斯的据点。无人机把我们飞进去——之后就得靠我们自己了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_MTL_WECOMEINTOTHISWO: ^2Mitchell: ^7艾恩斯给了我第二次机会，我还给了他。他以为自己能解决世界的问题。如果他真有答案，他也带进坟墓里了。但他有一点说对了。这不是终点，这只是开始。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_PA_INTRUDERSINSECTOR: ^2PA: ^7四区发现未授权人员。重复，四区发现未授权人员。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FINALE_FIN_PA_SECURITYBREACHINT: ^2PA: ^7发射井出现安全漏洞。所有单位立即前往四区。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_ALR_IVEGOTTENCASUALT: ^2Alpha Leader: ^7我这边十人阵亡，还有十几人受伤！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_BRAVOTHISISWRAIT: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7Bravo，这是幽灵2-3，即将对敌方步兵进行扫射。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_BRAVOWECANTGETNE: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7Bravo，我们无法接近那些地面爆炸。正绕到东南塔楼。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_CONTACTCONTACTDE: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7接敌，接敌！释放蜂群对抗措施。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_INEEDCASEVACUNIT: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7我需要主庭院附近的伤员撤离单位。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_NEGATIVEONTHATRE: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7否定受限交战规则，2-4，我们可以自由攻击所有目标，完毕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_TWOFIVEBREAKPOSI: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^72-5，脱离位置并向Alpha提供支援，完毕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_TWOFOURWEVEGOTAS: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^72-4，我们十二点钟方向有地空导弹发射，完毕！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_TWOONEWEREBEARIN: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^72-1，我们航向315度磁向，高度12000英尺，距离目标两海里，完毕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH2_COPYTWOTHREEWEHA: ^2Chopper Pilot 2: ^7收到2-3，我们在北边堆场目视到敌军。Alpha已在GRG坐标K49攻击多个目标。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH3_TWOTHREEUNDERSTA: ^2Chopper Pilot 3: ^72-3，了解我们仍在受限交战规则下行动，完毕？
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH3_WRAITHTWOTHREEWE: ^2Chopper Pilot 3: ^7幽灵2-3，我们被击中了，被击中了！正在稳定——！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CTR_OURDRONEOPERATOR: ^2Carter: ^7我们的无人机操作员头部中弹了！他倒了，他倒了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_ALPHATEAMSGOTTHE: ^2Gideon: ^7Alpha队把KVA压制在主庭院里了，这里和这里。反应堆建筑已经被破坏了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_ALPHAWEAREBOOTSO: ^2Gideon: ^7Alpha，我们已着陆，从你们三点钟方向进入！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_COPYTHAT2: ^2Gideon: ^7收到！反应堆室遭遇激烈抵抗！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_DAMNITWASSTABLEA: ^2Gideon: ^7该死，刚才还稳定的！正在重新路由！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_EVERYONESEEINGTH: ^2Gideon: ^7都看到了吗？好的。我们有可靠情报，KVA正试图在反应堆建筑引发熔毁。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_EYESFORWARDNOTHI: ^2Gideon: ^7看前面，我们无能为力！准备部署！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_GETMOREAMMOFORTH: ^2Gideon: ^7给那个发射器多拿点弹药，米切尔！
^2Gideon: ^7给那个发射器多拿点弹药，米切尔！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_GONNABEAGOODONE: ^2Gideon: ^7会很好玩的，米切尔。就像朝鲜，只是辐射更多。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_LOOKSLIKEALPHAIS: ^2Gideon: ^7看起来Alpha已经深陷其中了！我们跟他们一起向目标建筑推进！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLGETONBOA: ^2Gideon: ^7米切尔！上飞机！我们需要撤离，现在！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLGRABTHAT: ^2Gideon: ^7米切尔，拿上发射器干掉那台泰坦！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLTHEAREAI: ^2Gideon: ^7米切尔！区域不安全了！我们立即撤离，现在！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLTOSSATHR: ^2Gideon: ^7米切尔，往里面扔颗威胁手雷然后开火！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_OKCORETEMPISMAIN: ^2Gideon: ^7好的，堆芯温度稳定。需要注满冷却池…等等！水位在下降！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_PROPHETATLASTEAM: ^2Gideon: ^7先知，阿特拉斯队正在撤离！区域已经不安全！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_PROPHETIMGETTING: ^2Gideon: ^7先知，我的显示器有很多静电干扰，收到？
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_PROPHETTHEKVAJUS: ^2Gideon: ^7先知，KVA直接把泰坦开到了庭院中间！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_PROPHETWEVEGOTKV: ^2Gideon: ^7先知，北塔附近有KVA的撤离直升机！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_ROGERCANTHESTEAM: ^2Gideon: ^7明白，蒸汽管线还能充分排放吗？
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_THISISAKILLBOXDE: ^2Gideon: ^7这是个杀戮区，在门口部署掩体。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_THISSHITENDSINTH: ^2Gideon: ^7这事在控制室做个了结。不留活口。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WELLTHISISNTANOR: ^2Gideon: ^7今天可真不是普通的营业日！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WEREINSERTINGINT: ^2Gideon: ^7我们从南庭院进入，向北推进。这事在控制室做个了结。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WRAITHTWOTHREEBR: ^2Gideon: ^7幽灵2-3，Bravo-2倒了！我需要立即医疗撤离！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_YOURMTISDOWN: ^2Gideon: ^7你的机甲被击毁了！跳伞，跳伞！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_YOUVEGOT100MMROU: ^2Gideon: ^7主炮有100毫米炮弹，副武器有JDAM导弹，给他们点颜色看看！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_HADE_PEOPLEOFTHEWORL: ^2Hades: ^7全世界的人们，你们一直躲在科技的保护伞下。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_HADE_TECHNOLOGYISACA: ^2Hades: ^7科技是一种癌症。我是来把你们从这场癌症中解放出来的。世界必须回归其自然状态。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_HADE_TODAYWESTRIKEAT: ^2Hades: ^7我是哈迪斯，我是你们的救世主。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_JKR_BASTARDSGOTATROP: ^2Joker: ^7那混蛋有主动防御系统！再打一次！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_JKR_POORBASTARDSDIDN: ^2Joker: ^7可怜的混蛋们一点机会都没有。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_JKR_WERENOTEXACTLYST: ^2Joker: ^7我们可不是停下来喝咖啡的。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_JKR_YOUVEGOT25MMROUN: ^2Joker: ^7主炮有25毫米炮弹，副武器有JDAM导弹！给他们点颜色看看！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PA_WARNINGREACTORCRI: ^2PA: ^7警告。反应堆达到临界。立即撤离现场。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRG_CODEREDCODEREDWA: ^2PA recording: ^7红色警报，红色警报，警告，反应堆堆芯受损。宣布现场区域进入紧急状态。立即撤离。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRG_PLEASEPROCEEDTOT: ^2PA recording: ^7请前往最近的紧急出口。发光标识牌将指引您前往最近的出口。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRG_WARNINGCONTAINME: ^2PA recording: ^7警告，安全气闸正在关闭。请后退。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_AFFIRMATIVEBRAVO: ^2Prophet: ^7确认，Bravo1号。我们已经通过追踪器锁定他们。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_ALLUNITSGETROTOR: ^2Prophet: ^7所有单位，让旋翼落地，把那些人撤出来，立刻！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_BRAVOGETTHROUGHT: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo，以最快速度穿过反应堆区域。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_BRAVOPRESSUREREA: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo，压力读数达到临界。立即把你的人撤出来！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_BRAVOTEAMBEADVIS: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo队，请注意。KVA的技术人员已经覆写了安全协议，正试图触发临界事件。我们没有时间了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_BRAVOWEHAVEANIMM: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo，我们即将面临七级事件，命令你们立即从该区域撤出。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_BURKECORETEMPERA: ^2Prophet: ^7吉迪恩，堆芯温度达到临界。中止任务。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_COPY2: ^2Prophet: ^7收到。我们看到和你一样的画面。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_COPYTHATBRAVOWEV: ^2Prophet: ^7收到，Bravo，我们看到了你们位置附近的一个发射器。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_IMSEEINGAMASSIVE: ^2Prophet: ^7我看到北塔下面发生了巨大爆炸！Bravo，回话！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_INDICATORSAREBEL: ^2Prophet: ^7指标低于正常水平，但在稳定范围内。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_TWENTYPLUSFOOTMO: ^2Prophet: ^7二十多名步兵从西北方向接近。
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_WEHAVEALEVEL7: ^2Prophet: ^7我们面临七级事件。立即撤离该区域！
schinese.SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_WEREPICKINGUPSIG: ^2Prophet: ^7我们正在接收敌方电磁脉冲造成的信号失真。正在清除。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_GDN_CUTTHROUGHCOPS: ^2Gideon: ^7伊洛娜，哈迪斯在左右突围！他的卡车装甲很厚！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_GDN_DONOTLETUPPLEASE: ^2Gideon: ^7Bravo，不要松懈！不惜一切代价抓住哈迪斯！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_CLEAROUTSNIPERPI: ^2Ilona: ^7毒刺导弹能干掉那个狙击手！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_DRONESDOWNYALL: ^2Ilona: ^7无人机坠毁了。继续向那个狙击手推进！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_EYESONSANCHEZ: ^2Ilona: ^7先知，看到托雷斯了！他中弹了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_EYESONVEHICLEALM: ^2Ilona: ^7看到哈迪斯的卡车了！我们快到了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_GETDOWNSTAYDOWN: ^2Ilona: ^7趴下！远离窗户！所有人都远离窗户！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_GONNAOPENORWHAT: ^2Ilona: ^7米切尔，开门！KVA的增援正在路上！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_GOODNOWWEJUST: ^2Ilona: ^7现在——找KVA的通讯信号。那是我们进入安全屋的门票。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_HADESISGETTINGOO: ^2Ilona: ^7该死的，米切尔！哈迪斯要跑了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_HESNOTHERE: ^2Ilona: ^7他不在这里。切换到另一个摄像头。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_JUMPDOWNBEOTCH: ^2Ilona: ^7哈迪斯快到了！跳下来，我们好设伏！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_KEYMANISINHIS: ^2Ilona: ^7关键人物三十多岁——休闲着装。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_KEYMANSLIPPED: ^2Ilona: ^7该死！先知，我们丢失了信号。关键人物溜了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_KVACELLPHONES: ^2Ilona: ^7找到关键人物。扫描通讯信号。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_LASTDRONELIGHTUP: ^2Ilona: ^7最后一架无人机了！干掉那个狙击手！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_MAKEITQUICK: ^2Ilona: ^7我们跟踪他，进去后消灭任何发现的KVA。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_MAKESURESTREETS: ^2Ilona: ^7确保街道安全！街道安全之前不要接近哈迪斯！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_NEEDRPGOMG: ^2Ilona: ^7米切尔——二楼。我们需要毒刺导弹！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_NEGATIVEM: ^2Ilona: ^7不。信号很接近，但不是KVA。继续找。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_NEVERHITHIM: ^2Ilona: ^7你用那个根本打不中他！我们需要毒刺导弹！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_PUSHFOWARDCONTAI: ^2Ilona: ^7向前推进！我们需要控制现场！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_SHITTHATSALOTOGR: ^2Ilona: ^7操，这么大一片开阔地。你想先跑还是压制火力？
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_SNIPERCANTHIT: ^2Ilona: ^7快点，狙击手打不到街上的我们。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_STAYONMESANCHEZ: ^2Ilona: ^7跟着我，米切尔！托雷斯就在前面！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_STREETSARECLEARP: ^2Ilona: ^7安全！街道安全！先知，我们正在向哈迪斯推进！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_WASTINGTIMEWHATS: ^2Ilona: ^7我们在浪费时间！到底怎么样？
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_WELOSTEYESONKEY: ^2Ilona: ^7各台，我们跟丢了关键人物！重复，关键人物跑了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_WENEEDTOBESTUNG: ^2Ilona: ^7我们需要毒刺导弹！我掩护你！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_YOULHAVETODO: ^2Ilona: ^7你得拉近镜头才能好好扫描。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_YOUTAPPEDTHECAME: ^2Gideon: ^7米切尔，你接入了摄像头信号？
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_IRS_TEAMIDONTNEEDTO: ^2Irons: ^7队员们，不用我提醒你们这次任务有多重要。哈迪斯应对四年前的核袭击负责。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_IRS_WEBRINGHIMDOWNWE: ^2Irons: ^7我们抓住他，就能摧毁整个KVA网络。容不得半点差错。完成任务。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_PRP_CONVOYISFOURX: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo，哈迪斯的车队距离目标点还有四分钟。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_PRP_KEYMANHASLEFTARE: ^2Prophet: ^7各台注意，关键人物已离开该区域。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_PRP_LOCALPOLICE: ^2Prophet: ^7各台注意，当地警方已加入追捕。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_PRP_TWOMIKESOUT: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo，哈迪斯的车队还有两分钟到达。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_SCZ_ATLASWEARE: ^2Torres: ^7阿特拉斯，我们正在18街的风车附近设置路障，还有——
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_SCZ_OFFICERSDOWN: ^2Torres: ^7有人倒了！有人倒了！风车里有狙击手！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_ABODYDOUBLE: ^2Gideon: ^7替身身上装了遥控炸弹！有人受伤了！重复——有人受伤了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_ALPHAHASEYES: ^2Gideon: ^7收到。哈迪斯刚进入会议中心。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_SCANNINGRETINA: ^2Gideon: ^7扫描视网膜。不匹配。不是哈迪斯！不是哈迪斯！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_SORRYTOINTERRUPT: ^2Gideon: ^7向前靠，伊洛娜。你应该在度蜜月的。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_THISISNT14: ^2Gideon: ^7这不是14街？我们有货物要送到14街。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_WECANTJUSTSIT: ^2Gideon: ^7我们不能光坐在这栋楼上，伊洛娜！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_YESMAAM: ^2Gideon: ^7对付哈迪斯和KVA，没有什么是按套路来的。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_HEFINDSNO: ^2Hades: ^7他在我们的事业中找不到力量。他只听从金钱！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_ITHADBETTER: ^2Hades: ^7最好如此，否则你直接向我交代。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_WEHAVECOME: ^2Hades: ^7我们走了这么远，不能让一个医生危及多年的计划！多年的牺牲！兄弟们，我们的耐心终于要有回报了。今天我们站在一起，在胜利的大门前。我向你们保证，这项技术将是粉碎—
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_WEHAVESECURED: ^2Hades: ^7我们在曼谷拿下了一处庄园。你把货运到那里进行最终测试。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_YOUWILLDOTHIS: ^2Hades: ^7你必须照办！就在我们争论不休的时候，这个医生正在向敌人泄露秘密！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_ALPHATON: ^2Ilona: ^7Alpha，我们遇到大量干扰！你们状态如何？
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_AUTOTRANSLATION: ^2Ilona: ^7先知——自动翻译在线并记录中。一旦哈迪斯透露地点和时间，WASP就干掉他。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_CANTGETABEAD: ^2Ilona: ^7无法瞄准那个狙击手！我们得靠近塔楼！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_COPYTHATALPHA: ^2Ilona: ^7收到，Alpha。米切尔，绕过去掩护中庭的玻璃侧。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_DAMMITMITCHELL: ^2Ilona: ^7该死的米切尔，他们发现我们了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_DOWNTHESTAIRS: ^2Ilona: ^7米切尔！下楼梯到后街！我们需要拦截哈迪斯！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_DROPEMALPH: ^2Ilona: ^7需要把KVA从那道门引开。能干掉就干掉，或者用车喇叭声分散他们注意力。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_DROPTHEMALL: ^2Ilona: ^7楼梯顶。两个一起干掉，米切尔。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_FINDHIM: ^2Ilona: ^7找到他，否则整个任务就泡汤了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_GETEYESONHADES: ^2Ilona: ^7米切尔，移动WASP，监视哈迪斯的会议。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_GETMOVINGHADES: ^2Ilona: ^7米切尔，快走！哈迪斯的会议不到一小时后就要开始了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_GETONITMITCHELL: ^2Ilona: ^7快去做，米切尔！我还在追踪信号源！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_GOTASTAMP: ^2Ilona: ^7锁定引爆器频率。稍等，我正在追踪信号源！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_HAVENTLOSTAFISH: ^2Ilona: ^7第一阶段堪称教科书。我们跟踪目标，拿他的钥匙卡，清理安全屋。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_HOLDFIREUNTIL: ^2Ilona: ^7米切尔，监视那个会议。把哈迪斯稳稳套进瞄准镜。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_IJUSTCONFIRMEDHA: ^2Ilona: ^7身份确认——哈迪斯阵亡。我重复——哈迪斯阵亡。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_IVELOSTVISUAL: ^2Ilona: ^7我看不到他了！吉迪恩！吉迪恩，如果你能听到，跟上哈迪斯！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_MANDOWNTHEY: ^2Ilona: ^7有人倒了！他们抓住了吉迪恩！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_MITCHELLMOVETHE: ^2Ilona: ^7米切尔，把WASP移到建筑的玻璃侧。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_MITCHWHENYOURREA: ^2Ilona: ^7Alpha，等待WASP。米切尔，准备好了就行动。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_MUTECHARGEEXPIRE: ^2Ilona: ^7静音炸药失效了！该死！KVA知道我们在这里了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_NEXTIMEWAITIDIOT: ^2Ilona: ^7该死。下次给我们信号，米切尔。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_ONEOFTHEGUARD: ^2Ilona: ^7有个守卫警觉了！杀了他，米切尔！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_PROPHETKEEPEYES: ^2Ilona: ^7先知保持监视。如果有变数就通知。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_PROPHETPLEASECLA: ^2Ilona: ^7明白，先知。加快脚步，Alpha。别错过这场大戏。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_PROPHETSAFEHOUSE: ^2Ilona: ^7先知，安全屋安全。将监视会议中心。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_PUTONYOUREXOSUIT: ^2Ilona: ^7米切尔，穿上外骨骼。我来组装WASP。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_REMEMBERNOONE: ^2Ilona: ^7记住，你的击杀不能被任何人看到。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_REMEMBERTHECHARG: ^2Ilona: ^7炸药只提供有限范围的掩护。快速清理他们。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_SHOOTHEEYES: ^2Ilona: ^7两个守卫在监视庭院，米切尔。干掉他们。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_SHOOTINTHEBACK: ^2Ilona: ^7先干掉掉队的，然后向前推进。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_TAKEEMOUT: ^2Ilona: ^7米切尔，我来报目标。打那两个在警戒位的。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_TAKETHEDRONEEARS: ^2Ilona: ^7抓无人机，米切尔。我来监听哈迪斯的会议。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_TAKETHOSEDRONES: ^2Ilona: ^7用声波武器对付那些无人机，米切尔！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_THEREALHADES: ^2Ilona: ^7真正的哈迪斯就在附近，吉迪恩！不能跟丢他！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_THEREGOTAVISUAL: ^2Ilona: ^7那里。盯住哈迪斯了。真希望现在就能干掉他。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_WENEEDTOPULL: ^2Ilona: ^7需要把KVA从那道门引开，好让Alpha进入。触发汽车警报。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_WERECRAWLINGWITH: ^2Gideon: ^7到处都是KVA！继续向前推进，拦截哈迪斯！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_YOUNEARLYBLEW: ^2Ilona: ^7你差点把定时器搞砸了。得快一点。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_YOURDATEIS: ^2Gideon: ^7切换到Bravo视角。米切尔——你的妻子在等你。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_YOUREXOSISFIT: ^2Ilona: ^7你的外骨骼装了城市套件。在人群里遇到麻烦？别犹豫，直接释放声波武器。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_ALLSTATIONSWILL: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7所有站点将按时确保安全，长官。您的会议将不受干扰。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_DAMINPROPDISENGA: ^2Ilona: ^7该死！先知，米切尔脱离了！哈迪斯跑了！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_DIMITRIISTHAT: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7迪米特里！那辆车走了没有？
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_IDONTCARE: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7我不在乎！把车开走，否则我们帮你。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_MAKESURETHE: ^2KVA Soldier One: ^7我已经确保狙击手就位了。他们会每十五分钟检查一次。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_NOWEHAVENT: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7不，我们还没有。是的，长官。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_PROTECTHADESATAL: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7不惜一切代价保护哈迪斯！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_THATPOSES: ^2KVA Captain: ^7那风险太大了。我们不知道货物是否足够稳定——
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_THEREISABLIND: ^2KVA Soldier Two: ^7从这个制高点看，这条巷子里有个盲区。在那个角落安排一个人来覆盖。至于外围，我们在每层和停车场都布置了巡逻队，这里和这里。会议一结束，一辆装甲—
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_THISDOCTORWILL: ^2KVA Captain: ^7这个医生什么都不会说。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_THISISPRIVATE: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7这是私人财产。你必须离开。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ABORTTHEMISSION: ^2Prophet: ^7各台中止！守卫被惊动了！重复，中止！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLSTATIONSABORT: ^2Prophet: ^7各台中止！Bravo已暴露。重复，Bravo已暴露。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLSTATIONSBEADV: ^2Prophet: ^7各台注意，看起来哈迪斯要开始会议了。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLSTATSCONVOYSO: ^2Prophet: ^7各台注意，哈迪斯车队正向南行驶！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLTEAMSBEADVISE: ^2Prophet: ^7各队注意，Bravo在待命。可能有情况。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLTEAMSONHADES: ^2Prophet: ^7各队注意哈迪斯！各队注意哈迪斯！卡车正向南行驶！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLTEAMSVEHICLE: ^2Prophet: ^7各队——卡车离开南车库。是哈迪斯！哈迪斯在移动！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOTHEREISNOTI: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo——没时间闲逛了。跟住你的目标。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOWELOSTCOM: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo，我们与Alpha失去联系了。正在尝试修复。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOYOURWINDOW: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo，机会窗口正在关闭。干掉守卫。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_COVERISBLOWN: ^2Prophet: ^7各台，彻底暴露！中止！中止！中止！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_POSITIVEID: ^2Prophet: ^7通讯信号匹配KVA。他就是我们的关键人物。
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_WASPYOUVEBEENSPO: ^2Prophet: ^7WASP你被发现了！中止任务！我重复，中止任务！
schinese.SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_SAN_MANDOWNSNIPERBEL: ^2Torres: ^7有人倒了！有人倒了！钟楼里有狙击手！
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_ANINTRUDER1: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7我这边可能有点发现。准备好无人机。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_APROBLEM: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7等等。我们可能遇到问题了。待命。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_ARENTALLOWE: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7抱歉先生，客人不能到这里来。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_BEHAVING: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7到目前为止大家都很规矩。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_COMINGTOYOU: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7我们正前往你处。通知艾恩斯先生有入侵。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_FOUNDBODY1: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7我发现一具尸体。寻找入侵者。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_HESARMED: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7我看到庄园里有闯入者。他有武器。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_IRONSASSIST: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7艾恩斯先生的助理正在前往主宅。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_KEEPEMBUSY: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7支援马上就到。拖住他们。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_LOCKEDOWN1: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7他死了。封锁庄园。给艾恩斯先生打电话！
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_NEEDBACKUP1: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7有安全漏洞！让客人离开！
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_NOTHINGFOUN: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7这边没发现什么。别惊动客人。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_OFFLIMITS: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7抱歉先生，庄园这部分禁止进入。请离开。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_PARTGUESTS: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7有几个派对上的人在网球场。正在护送他们回去。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_SAWSOMETHIN: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7我好像看到了什么。给艾恩斯先生打电话。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_SEESOMETHIN: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7等等。我好像看到了什么。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_SENDINGDRON: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7我们正在向你的位置派遣无人机。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_SENDREINFOR: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7安全漏洞！封锁所有出口。通知艾恩斯先生！
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_SPREADOUT1: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7有人倒了。散开搜索区域。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_STANDBY2: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7我听到了什么。让无人机待命。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_STAYALERT: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7我什么都没发现。取消向艾恩斯的报告。
schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS1_SUSPICIOUSA: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7安全。可能只是个派对的客人。

schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS2_FOUNDBODY1: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7我发现一具尸体。寻找入侵者。

schinese.SUBTITLE_IRONS_ESTATE_IE_AS3_AIRCRAFT: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7刚收到消息，有架飞机会在着陆跑道降落。
